discoveries.lean_statement: def circleDim (n_free : Nat) (_n_torsion : Nat) : Nat
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension: the rank of the free part of a finitely generated abelian group.
    def:circle-dimension

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem circleDim_Zk (k : Nat) : circleDim k 0 = k
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension of Z^k is k.
    prop:circle-dimension-Zk

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem circleDim_finite (t : Nat) : circleDim 0 t = 0
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension of a finite group is 0.
    prop:circle-dimension-finite

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_add (a b c d : Nat) :
    circleDim (a + b) (c + d) = circleDim a c + circleDim b d
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension is additive under direct sum.
    prop:circle-dimension-add

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_iso (a b c d : Nat) (h : a = b) :
    circleDim a c = circleDim b d
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension is invariant under equal free rank.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_finite_extension (n t1 t2 : Nat) :
    circleDim n t1 = circleDim n t2
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension depends only on free rank, not torsion.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_eq_zero_iff (n t : Nat) :
    circleDim n t = 0 ↔ n = 0
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension is zero iff free rank is zero.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement: def halfCircleDim (n_free : Nat) (n_torsion : Nat) : ℚ
discoveries.docstring:
Half circle dimension: circleDim / 2 as a rational number.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem halfCircleDim_nat : halfCircleDim 1 0 = 1 / 2
discoveries.docstring:
Half circle dimension of ℤ is 1/2.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_mono {n₁ n₂ t : Nat} (h : n₁ ≤ n₂) :
    circleDim n₁ t ≤ circleDim n₂ t
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension is monotone in free rank.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem halfCircleDim_add (a b c d : Nat) :
    halfCircleDim (a + b) (c + d) = halfCircleDim a c + halfCircleDim b d
discoveries.docstring:
Half circle dimension is additive under direct sum.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_mul (r s t1 t2 : Nat) :
    circleDim (r * s) (t1 * t2) = circleDim r t1 * circleDim s t2
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension tensor product law: cdim(G ⊗ H) = cdim(G) · cdim(H).
    prop:cdim-tensor-hom-ext-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_hom (r s t1 t2 : Nat) :
    circleDim (r * s) (t1 * t2) = circleDim r t1 * circleDim s t2
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension Hom law: cdim(Hom(G,H)) = cdim(G) · cdim(H).
    prop:cdim-tensor-hom-ext-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_ext1_vanishing (t : Nat) :
    circleDim 0 t = 0
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension Ext¹ vanishing: cdim(Ext¹(G,H)) = 0.
    prop:cdim-tensor-hom-ext-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_circleDim_tensor (r s t1 t2 : Nat) :
    circleDim (r * s) (t1 * t2) = circleDim r t1 * circleDim s t2
discoveries.docstring: Paper: prop:cdim-tensor-hom-ext-laws (tensor)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_circleDim_ext1_vanishing (t : Nat) :
    circleDim 0 t = 0
discoveries.docstring: Paper: prop:cdim-tensor-hom-ext-laws (Ext¹ vanishing)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_axiomatic_rigidity (f : Nat → Nat → Nat)
    (hAdd : ∀ a b c d, f (a + b) (c + d) = f a c + f b d)
    (hNorm : f 1 0 = 1)
    (hFin : ∀ t, f 0 t = 0) :
    ∀ n t, f n t = circleDim n t
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro n t
  -- Step 1: f n t = f n 0 (torsion invariance)
  have htors : f n t = f n 0 := by
    have := hAdd n 0 0 t
    simp at this
    linarith [hFin t]
  -- Step 2: f n 0 = n (by induction)
  suffices h : ∀ n, f n 0 = n from by rw [htors, h]; rfl
  intro n
  induction n with
  | zero => exact hFin 0
  | succ n ih =>
    have := hAdd n 1 0 0
    simp at this
    linarith [hNorm]
discoveries.docstring:
Axiomatic rigidity: any function satisfying additivity, normalization f(Z)=1,
    and f(finite)=0 must equal circleDim.
    thm:cdim-axiomatic-rigidity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_circleDim_axiomatic_rigidity (f : Nat → Nat → Nat)
    (hAdd : ∀ a b c d, f (a + b) (c + d) = f a c + f b d)
    (hNorm : f 1 0 = 1)
    (hFin : ∀ t, f 0 t = 0) :
    ∀ n t, f n t = circleDim n t
discoveries.docstring: Paper: thm:cdim-axiomatic-rigidity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem halfCircleDim_pos_iff (r t : Nat) :
    0 < halfCircleDim r t ↔ 0 < r
discoveries.docstring:
Half circle dimension is positive iff free rank is positive.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_halfCircleDim_pos_iff (r t : Nat) :
    0 < halfCircleDim r t ↔ 0 < r
discoveries.docstring: Paper: prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_sub (a b t1 t2 : Nat) (_h : a ≤ b) :
    circleDim (b - a) t1 = circleDim b t2 - circleDim a t2
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension subtraction: cdim(b-a) = cdim(b) - cdim(a) when a ≤ b.
    thm:cdim-short-exact-additivity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem circleDim_strictMono (a b t1 t2 : Nat) (h : a < b) :
    circleDim a t1 < circleDim b t2
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension strict monotonicity.
    thm:cdim-short-exact-additivity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem halfCircleDim_strictMono (a b t1 t2 : Nat) (h : a < b) :
    halfCircleDim a t1 < halfCircleDim b t2
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold halfCircleDim circleDim
  exact div_lt_div_of_pos_right (by exact_mod_cast h) (by norm_num)
discoveries.docstring:
Half circle dimension strict monotonicity.
    thm:cdim-short-exact-additivity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_circleDim_sub (a b t1 t2 : Nat) (h : a ≤ b) :
    circleDim (b - a) t1 = circleDim b t2 - circleDim a t2
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  circleDim_sub a b t1 t2 h
discoveries.docstring: Paper: thm:cdim-short-exact-additivity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_circleDim_strictMono (a b t1 t2 : Nat) (h : a < b) :
    circleDim a t1 < circleDim b t2

theorem circleDim_add_three (a b c t1 t2 t3 : Nat) :
    circleDim (a + b + c) (t1 + t2 + t3) =
      circleDim a t1 + circleDim b t2 + circleDim c t3
discoveries.docstring:
Circle dimension of triple direct sum.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem halfCircleDim_add_three (a b c t1 t2 t3 : Nat) :
    halfCircleDim (a + b + c) (t1 + t2 + t3) =
      halfCircleDim a t1 + halfCircleDim b t2 + halfCircleDim c t3
discoveries.docstring:
Half circle dimension of triple direct sum.
    prop:circle-dimension-laws

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_circleDim_add_three (a b c t1 t2 t3 : Nat) :
    circleDim (a + b + c) (t1 + t2 + t3) =
      circleDim a t1 + circleDim b t2 + circleDim c t3
discoveries.docstring: Paper: prop:circle-dimension-laws (triple sum)

discoveries.lean_statement: def cdimDefect (f : CircleDimHomData) : Nat
discoveries.docstring: Circle dimension defect of a homomorphism. def:cdim-defect

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cdim_rank_nullity (f : CircleDimHomData) :
    circleDim f.sourceRank 0 =
      circleDim f.kernelRank 0 + circleDim f.imageRank 0
discoveries.docstring: Rank-nullity formula for circle dimension. thm:cdim-rank-nullity-formula

discoveries.lean_statement:
def CircleDimHomData.comp (f : CircleDimHomData) (g : CircleDimHomData)
    (_hfg : f.targetRank = g.sourceRank)
    (restrictedKerRank : Nat)
    (_hRestrict : restrictedKerRank ≤ g.kernelRank)
    (hRestrictBound : restrictedKerRank ≤ f.imageRank)
    (hImageSplit : f.imageRank ≤ restrictedKerRank + g.imageRank) :
    CircleDimHomData where
  sourceRank := f.sourceRank
  targetRank := g.targetRank
  kernelRank := f.kernelRank + restrictedKerRank
  imageRank := f.imageRank - restrictedKerRank
  rankNullity
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by have := f.rankNullity; omega
  imageBound := by have := g.imageBound; omega
discoveries.docstring: Composition data for g∘f. thm:cdim-defect-chain-rule

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cdimDefect_comp (f g : CircleDimHomData)
    (hfg : f.targetRank = g.sourceRank)
    (restrictedKerRank : Nat)
    (hRestrict : restrictedKerRank ≤ g.kernelRank)
    (hRestrictBound : restrictedKerRank ≤ f.imageRank)
    (hImageSplit : f.imageRank ≤ restrictedKerRank + g.imageRank) :
    cdimDefect (f.comp g hfg restrictedKerRank hRestrict hRestrictBound hImageSplit) =
      cdimDefect f + restrictedKerRank
discoveries.docstring: Defect chain rule: δ(g∘f) = δ(f) + δ(g|_{im f}). thm:cdim-defect-chain-rule

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cdimDefect_comp_le (f g : CircleDimHomData)
    (hfg : f.targetRank = g.sourceRank)
    (restrictedKerRank : Nat)
    (hRestrict : restrictedKerRank ≤ g.kernelRank)
    (hRestrictBound : restrictedKerRank ≤ f.imageRank)
    (hImageSplit : f.imageRank ≤ restrictedKerRank + g.imageRank) :
    cdimDefect (f.comp g hfg restrictedKerRank hRestrict hRestrictBound hImageSplit) ≤
      cdimDefect f + cdimDefect g
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [cdimDefect_comp]
  exact Nat.add_le_add_left hRestrict _
discoveries.docstring: Defect sub-additivity: δ(g∘f) ≤ δ(f) + δ(g). thm:cdim-defect-chain-rule

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cdim_min_ledger_cost (f : CircleDimHomData) (R_rank : Nat)
    (hInj : f.kernelRank ≤ R_rank) :
    circleDim f.kernelRank 0 ≤ circleDim R_rank 0
discoveries.docstring: Minimum injectivization cost equals kernel rank. thm:cdim-minimal-ledger-cost-kernel

discoveries.lean_statement: def phaseSpectrumCount (r t N : Nat) : Nat
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum count for Z^r × Z/tZ: |Hom(G, Z/NZ)| = N^r · gcd(t, N).
    def:cdim-phase-spectrum

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_free (r N : Nat) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r 0 N = N ^ (r + 1)
discoveries.docstring:
Free part: phaseSpectrumCount r 0 N = N^{r+1} (gcd(0,N) = N).
    prop:cdim-phase-spectrum-quotient

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_torsion (t N : Nat) :
    phaseSpectrumCount 0 t N = Nat.gcd t N
discoveries.docstring:
Torsion part: phaseSpectrumCount for pure torsion.
    prop:cdim-phase-spectrum-quotient

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_mono_rank {r₁ r₂ : Nat} (h : r₁ ≤ r₂) (t N : Nat) (hN : 1 ≤ N) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r₁ t N ≤ phaseSpectrumCount r₂ t N
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [phaseSpectrumCount]
  exact Nat.mul_le_mul_right _ (Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by omega) h)
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum count is monotone in free rank.
    thm:cdim-phase-spectrum-limit

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_at_one (r t : Nat) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r t 1 = 1
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum count at N=1 is always 1.
    thm:cdim-phase-spectrum-limit

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_coprime (r t N : Nat) (hcop : Nat.Coprime t N) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r t N = N ^ r
discoveries.docstring:
Coprime torsion becomes invisible: phaseSpectrumCount = N^r when gcd(t,N)=1.
    thm:cdim-phase-spectrum-limit

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_split (r t N : Nat) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r t N = N ^ r * Nat.gcd t N
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum split: free part x torsion part.
    prop:cdim-phase-spectrum-quotient

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_mul_coprime (r1 r2 t1 t2 N : Nat)
    (hcop : Nat.Coprime t1 t2) :
    phaseSpectrumCount (r1 + r2) (t1 * t2) N =
      phaseSpectrumCount r1 t1 N * phaseSpectrumCount r2 t2 N
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [phaseSpectrumCount, pow_add]
  rw [Nat.gcd_comm, Nat.Coprime.gcd_mul N hcop, Nat.gcd_comm t1, Nat.gcd_comm t2]
  ring

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Phase R166: Gap ledger definitions and properties
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum count is multiplicative for coprime torsion factors.
    prop:cdim-phase-spectrum-quotient

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem firstHittingTime_antitone (e : Nat → ℝ) :
    Antitone (fun ε => firstHittingTime e ε)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro ε₁ ε₂ h
  simp only [firstHittingTime]
  apply iInf_mono
  intro n
  apply iInf_mono'
  intro h₂
  exact ⟨lt_of_lt_of_le h₂ h, le_refl _⟩
discoveries.docstring:
First hitting time is antitone in the threshold.
    def:cdim-gap-ledger

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem separationDepth_comm {α : Type*} (distinguish : Nat → α → α → Bool)
    (hsymm : ∀ n x y, distinguish n x y = distinguish n y x)
    (x y : α) :
    separationDepth distinguish x y = separationDepth distinguish y x
discoveries.docstring:
Separation depth is symmetric when the distinguisher is symmetric.
    def:cdim-gap-ledger

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_add_rank_le (r₁ r₂ t N : Nat) (hN : 1 ≤ N) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r₁ t N ≤ phaseSpectrumCount (r₁ + r₂) t N
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [phaseSpectrumCount]
  calc N ^ r₁ * Nat.gcd t N
      = N ^ r₁ * 1 * Nat.gcd t N := by ring
    _ ≤ N ^ r₁ * N ^ r₂ * Nat.gcd t N := by
        gcongr; exact Nat.one_le_pow _ _ hN
    _ = N ^ (r₁ + r₂) * Nat.gcd t N := by rw [← pow_add]
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum is monotone in rank (additive form).
    thm:cdim-phase-spectrum-limit

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem phaseSpectrumCount_le_pow (r t N : Nat) (hN : 0 < N) :
    phaseSpectrumCount r t N ≤ N ^ (r + 1)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [phaseSpectrumCount, pow_succ]
  exact Nat.mul_le_mul_left _ (Nat.gcd_le_right t hN)

end Omega.CircleDimension
discoveries.docstring:
Phase spectrum upper bound: phaseSpectrumCount r t N ≤ N^(r+1).
    thm:cdim-phase-spectrum-limit

discoveries.lean_statement: abbrev PrimeSupport
def multiPrimeSpectrum (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) (J : PrimeSupport) : Nat
def typeCount (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) (J : PrimeSupport) : Nat
discoveries.docstring:
Type count n_A(J): exact-support multiplicity.
    thm:cdim-mobius-inversion-localization-multiset-classification

discoveries.lean_statement: def inducedSpectrum (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) (n : PrimeSupport → Nat) (J : PrimeSupport) : Nat
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  Finset.sum supports (fun K => if J ⊆ K then n K else 0)
discoveries.docstring:
Induced spectrum from finitely many support types with multiplicity function `n`.
    thm:cdim-multiprime-spectrum-realizability

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem multiPrimeSpectrum_eq_count (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) (J : PrimeSupport) :
    multiPrimeSpectrum supports J = (supports.filter fun S => J ⊆ S).card
discoveries.docstring:
Explicit count formula for the divisible multiprime spectrum.
    prop:cdim-multiprime-divisible-spectrum-explicit

discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold multiPrimeSpectrum
  apply Finset.card_le_card
  intro S hS
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hS ⊢
  exact ⟨hS.1, fun x hxJ => hS.2 (hJK hxJ)⟩
discoveries.docstring:
Antitone in the prime support parameter.
    prop:cdim-multiprime-divisible-spectrum-explicit

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem multiPrimeSpectrum_empty (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) :
    multiPrimeSpectrum supports ∅ = supports.card
discoveries.docstring:
Empty support is counted by every support set.
    prop:cdim-multiprime-divisible-spectrum-explicit

discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold multiPrimeSpectrum
  apply Finset.card_pos.mpr
  refine ⟨J, ?_⟩
  simp [hJ]
discoveries.docstring:
Any support counts itself, hence contributes positive spectrum mass.
    prop:cdim-multiprime-divisible-spectrum-explicit

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem multiPrimeSpectrum_eq_sum_typeCount
    (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) (J : PrimeSupport) :
    multiPrimeSpectrum supports J =
      Finset.sum supports (fun K => if J ⊆ K then typeCount supports K else 0)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have htc : ∀ {K : PrimeSupport}, K ∈ supports → typeCount supports K = 1 := by
    intro K hK
    unfold typeCount
    have hEq : supports.filter (fun S => S = K) = {K} := by
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx ⊢
        exact hx.2
      · intro hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx ⊢
        subst hx
        exact ⟨hK, rfl⟩
    rw [hEq]
    simp
  unfold multiPrimeSpectrum
  rw [Finset.card_eq_sum_ones, Finset.sum_filter]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
  intro K hK
  by_cases hJK : J ⊆ K
  · simp [hJK, htc hK]
  · simp [hJK]
discoveries.docstring:
Zeta-transform identity: the spectrum is the finite sum of exact-support counts.
    thm:cdim-mobius-inversion-localization-multiset-classification

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem sum_typeCount_eq_card (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) :
    Finset.sum supports (typeCount supports) = supports.card
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have htc : ∀ {K : PrimeSupport}, K ∈ supports → typeCount supports K = 1 := by
    intro K hK
    unfold typeCount
    have hEq : supports.filter (fun S => S = K) = {K} := by
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx ⊢
        exact hx.2
      · intro hx
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_singleton] at hx ⊢
        subst hx
        exact ⟨hK, rfl⟩
    rw [hEq]
    simp
  rw [Finset.card_eq_sum_ones]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
  intro K hK
  simp [htc hK]
discoveries.docstring:
Total type count equals the total number of supports.
    thm:cdim-mobius-inversion-localization-multiset-classification

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem typeCount_le_multiPrimeSpectrum_of_subset
    {supports : Finset PrimeSupport} {J K : PrimeSupport}
    (hJK : J ⊆ K) :
    typeCount supports K ≤ multiPrimeSpectrum supports J
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold typeCount multiPrimeSpectrum
  apply Finset.card_le_card
  intro S hS
  simp only [Finset.mem_filter] at hS ⊢
  constructor
  · exact hS.1
  · simpa [hS.2] using hJK
discoveries.docstring:
A singleton type count is bounded by any spectrum indexed by a subset.
    thm:cdim-mobius-inversion-localization-multiset-classification

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem typeCount_le_multiPrimeSpectrum_empty
    (supports : Finset PrimeSupport) (K : PrimeSupport) :
    typeCount supports K ≤ multiPrimeSpectrum supports ∅
discoveries.docstring:
Every type count is bounded by the empty-support spectrum.
    thm:cdim-mobius-inversion-localization-multiset-classification

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem inducedSpectrum_singleton
    (K J : PrimeSupport) (n : Nat) :
    inducedSpectrum ({K} : Finset PrimeSupport) (fun S => if S = K then n else 0) J
      = if J ⊆ K then n else 0
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold inducedSpectrum
  by_cases hJK : J ⊆ K
  · simp [hJK]
  · simp [hJK]
discoveries.docstring:
Singleton-support realizability shadow.
    thm:cdim-multiprime-spectrum-realizability

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem inducedSpectrum_singleton_empty (K : PrimeSupport) (n : Nat) :
    inducedSpectrum ({K} : Finset PrimeSupport) (fun S => if S = K then n else 0) ∅ = n
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simpa using inducedSpectrum_singleton K ∅ n

end Omega.CircleDimension
discoveries.docstring:
Empty-support specialization of the singleton-shadow formula.
    thm:cdim-multiprime-spectrum-realizability

discoveries.lean_statement: def wordSupport (w : Word m) : Finset (Fin m)
discoveries.docstring: The support of a word: {i : Fin m | w i = true}.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem wordSupport_isPathIndependent {w : Word m} (hw : No11 w) :
    IsPathIndependent m (wordSupport w)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro i hi j hj hadj
  simp only [wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hi hj
  -- i.val + 1 = j.val, w i = true, w j = true → contradicts No11
  have hiLt : i.val < m := i.isLt
  have hjLt : j.val < m := j.isLt
  have hget_i : get w i.val = true := by rw [get]; simp [hiLt, hi]
  have hget_j : get w (i.val + 1) = true := by
    rw [get]; rw [hadj]; simp [hjLt, hj]
  exact hw i.val hget_i hget_j

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- indSetToWord: independent sets → Word m
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
discoveries.docstring:
No11 word's support is path-independent.
    thm:pom-wordSupport-pathInd

discoveries.lean_statement: def indSetToWord (S : Finset (Fin m)) : Word m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  fun i => if i ∈ S then true else false
discoveries.docstring: Characteristic function of an independent set as a word.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem indSetToWord_no11 {S : Finset (Fin m)} (hS : IsPathIndependent m S) :
    No11 (indSetToWord S)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro i hi hi1
  -- Extract i < m from get(indSetToWord S, i) = true
  unfold get indSetToWord at hi hi1
  split at hi
  · rename_i hiLt
    split at hi1
    · rename_i hi1Lt
      -- hi : (if ⟨i,_⟩ ∈ S then true else false) = true
      -- hi1 : (if ⟨i+1,_⟩ ∈ S then true else false) = true
      have h1 : (⟨i, hiLt⟩ : Fin m) ∈ S := by split at hi <;> simp_all
      have h2 : (⟨i + 1, hi1Lt⟩ : Fin m) ∈ S := by split at hi1 <;> simp_all
      exact hS ⟨i, hiLt⟩ h1 ⟨i + 1, hi1Lt⟩ h2 rfl
    · exact absurd hi1 Bool.false_ne_true
  · exact absurd hi Bool.false_ne_true

discoveries.lean_statement: def popcount (w : Word m) : Nat
discoveries.docstring: Number of true bits in a word.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem popcount_eq_count_true (w : Word m) :
    popcount w = (Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true)).card
discoveries.docstring: Number of true bits in a word.

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem popcount_allFalse : popcount (fun (_ : Fin m) => false) = 0
discoveries.docstring: thm:pom-popcount-allFalse

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem popcount_allTrue : popcount (fun (_ : Fin m) => true) = m
discoveries.docstring: thm:pom-popcount-allTrue

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem popcount_not (w : Word m) :
    popcount (fun i => !w i) + popcount w = m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [popcount, wordSupport]
  have hsplit : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin m)) =
      Finset.univ.filter (fun i => (!w i) = true) ∪
      Finset.univ.filter (fun i => w i = true) := by
    ext i; simp only [Finset.mem_univ, Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_filter, true_and]
    cases w i <;> simp
  have hdisj : Disjoint (Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => (!w i) = true))
      (Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true)) := by
    apply Finset.disjoint_filter.mpr; intro i _ h1 h2
    cases hb : w i <;> simp [hb] at h1 h2
  calc (Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => (!w i) = true)).card +
      (Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true)).card
      = (Finset.univ.filter (fun i => (!w i) = true) ∪
        Finset.univ.filter (fun i => w i = true)).card :=
          (Finset.card_union_of_disjoint hdisj).symm
    _ = Finset.univ.card := by rw [← hsplit]
    _ = Fintype.card (Fin m) := by rw [Finset.card_univ]
    _ = m := Fintype.card_fin m
discoveries.docstring:
popcount(bitwise complement) + popcount = m.
    thm:pom-popcount-not

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem popcount_eq_zero_iff (x : X m) :
    popcount x.1 = 0 ↔ x = ⟨fun _ => false, no11_allFalse⟩
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro h
    have hempty : wordSupport x.1 = ∅ := Finset.card_eq_zero.mp h
    apply Subtype.ext; funext i
    have : i ∉ wordSupport x.1 := by rw [hempty]; simp
    simp [wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter] at this; exact this
  · intro h; rw [h]; exact popcount_allFalse

popcount = 0 iff word is all-false.

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem popcount_truncate_le (w : Word (m + 1)) : popcount (truncate w) ≤ popcount w

  -- Inject Fin m → Fin (m+1) via Fin.castSucc
  apply Finset.card_le_card_of_injOn Fin.castSucc
  · intro i hi
    simp only [Finset.mem_coe, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hi ⊢
    simp [truncate] at hi; exact hi
  · intro i _ j _ h; exact Fin.castSucc_injective _ h

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Phase 221: popcount snoc

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem popcount_snoc_false (w : Word m) :
    popcount (snoc w false) = popcount w
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  -- popcount + popcount_complement = m, and complement commutes with snoc
  -- Simpler: use that popcount = m - popcount(!w) and work out directly
  -- Direct proof: count of true bits in snoc w false = count in w
  -- because the extra bit is false
  have := popcount_not (snoc w false)
  have := popcount_not w
  -- popcount(!snoc w false) + popcount(snoc w false) = m + 1
  -- popcount(!w) + popcount(w) = m
  -- !snoc w false = snoc (!w) true (negate each bit, last is !false = true)
  -- popcount(snoc (!w) true) = popcount(!w) + 1 (if we had popcount_snoc_true)
  -- Circular! Let me try the card_bij approach one more time but correctly.
  simp only [popcount, wordSupport]
  -- Goal: (filter Fin(m+1) (snoc w false · = true)).card = (filter Fin m (w · = true)).card
  -- Use card_bij in the ← direction (map RHS → LHS)
  symm
  apply Finset.card_bij (fun (i : Fin m) (_ : i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun j => w j = true)) =>
    (⟨i.val, Nat.lt_succ_of_lt i.isLt⟩ : Fin (m + 1)))
  · -- Map preserves membership
    intro ⟨i, hi⟩ hmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hmem ⊢
    show snoc w false ⟨i, Nat.lt_succ_of_lt hi⟩ = true
    simp [snoc, show i < m from hi, hmem]
  · -- Injectivity
    intro ⟨i₁, _⟩ _ ⟨i₂, _⟩ _ h
    exact Fin.ext (Fin.mk.inj h)
  · -- Surjectivity
    intro ⟨j, hj⟩ hjmem
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hjmem
    have hjLt : j < m := by
      rcases Nat.lt_or_ge j m with h | h
      · exact h
      · exfalso
        have : get (snoc w false) j = false := snoc_get_false_of_ge w h
        have : get (snoc w false) j = true := by rw [get_of_lt _ hj]; exact hjmem
        simp_all
    refine ⟨⟨j, hjLt⟩, ?_, Fin.ext rfl⟩
    simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
    have : snoc w false ⟨j, hj⟩ = w ⟨j, hjLt⟩ := by
      show (fun i : Fin (m + 1) => if h : i.1 < m then w ⟨i.1, h⟩ else false) ⟨j, hj⟩ = _
      simp [hjLt]
    rw [← this]; exact hjmem
discoveries.docstring: popcount(snoc w false) = popcount(w). thm:pom-popcount-snoc

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem popcount_snoc_true (w : Word m) :
    popcount (snoc w true) = popcount w + 1
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  -- Use complement: popcount(snoc w true) + popcount(!snoc w true) = m + 1
  -- !snoc w true = snoc (!w) false (negate each: last = !true = false)
  -- popcount(snoc (!w) false) = popcount(!w) = m - popcount w
  -- So popcount(snoc w true) = m + 1 - (m - popcount w) = popcount w + 1
  have h1 : popcount (fun i => !(snoc w true i)) + popcount (snoc w true) = m + 1 :=
    popcount_not (snoc w true)
  have h2 : (fun i : Fin (m + 1) => !(snoc w true i)) = snoc (fun i => !w i) false := by
    funext ⟨j, hj⟩
    simp only [snoc]
    split
    · rfl
    · rename_i h; simp
  rw [h2, popcount_snoc_false] at h1
  have h3 : popcount (fun i : Fin m => !w i) + popcount w = m := popcount_not w
  omega

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
discoveries.docstring: popcount(snoc w true) = popcount(w) + 1. thm:pom-popcount-snoc

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem weight_surjective (m n : Nat) (hn : n ≤ Nat.fib (m + 3) - 2) :
    ∃ w : Word m, weight w = n
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  induction m generalizing n with
  | zero =>
    have : n = 0 := by simp [Nat.fib] at hn; omega
    exact ⟨fun i => False.elim (Nat.not_lt_zero _ i.isLt), by simp [weight]; omega⟩
  | succ m ih =>
    by_cases hlt : n ≤ Nat.fib (m + 3) - 2
    · obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := ih n hlt
      exact ⟨snoc v false, by simp [weight, hv]⟩
    · push_neg at hlt
      have hfib4 := Nat.fib_add_two (n := m + 2)
      rw [show m + 2 + 2 = m + 4 from rfl, show m + 2 + 1 = m + 3 from rfl] at hfib4
      have hge : Nat.fib (m + 2) ≤ n := by
        have hfib3 := Nat.fib_add_two (n := m + 1)
        rw [show m + 1 + 2 = m + 3 from rfl, show m + 1 + 1 = m + 2 from rfl] at hfib3
        have := fib_succ_pos m
        omega
      have hle : n - Nat.fib (m + 2) ≤ Nat.fib (m + 3) - 2 := by
        have : Nat.fib (m + 1 + 3) = Nat.fib (m + 4) := rfl; omega
      obtain ⟨v, hv⟩ := ih (n - Nat.fib (m + 2)) hle
      exact ⟨snoc v true, by simp [weight, hv]; omega⟩
discoveries.docstring:
Every weight value in [0, F_{m+3}-2] is achieved by some word.
    thm:pom-weight-surjective

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem ewc_pos_of_le (m n : Nat) (hn : n ≤ Nat.fib (m + 3) - 2) :
    0 < exactWeightCount m n
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  obtain ⟨w, hw⟩ := weight_surjective m n hn
  exact Finset.card_pos.mpr ⟨w, Finset.mem_filter.mpr ⟨Finset.mem_univ _, hw⟩⟩

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem weight_truncate_add (w : Word (m + 1)) :
    weight w = weight (truncate w) +
    if w ⟨m, Nat.lt_succ_self m⟩ = true then Nat.fib (m + 2) else 0
discoveries.docstring: thm:pom-weight-truncate-add

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem weight_pos_iff (w : Word m) :
    0 < weight w ↔ ∃ i : Fin m, w i = true
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro hpos; by_contra h; push_neg at h
    have hall : w = fun _ => false := funext (fun i => by
      have := h i; simp only [ne_eq, Bool.not_eq_true] at this; exact this)
    rw [hall, weight_allFalse] at hpos; omega
  · intro ⟨i, hi⟩
    -- weight ≥ F_{i+2} ≥ 1
    calc 0 < 1 := by omega
      _ ≤ Nat.fib (i.val + 2) := fib_succ_pos (i.val + 1)
      _ ≤ weight w := by
        -- The contribution of bit i is F_{i+2}, which is ≤ weight
        induction m with
        | zero => exact absurd i.isLt (Nat.not_lt_zero _)
        | succ n ih =>
          rw [weight_truncate_add]
          by_cases hlt : i.val < n
          · have : Nat.fib (i.val + 2) ≤ weight (truncate w) :=
              ih (truncate w) ⟨i.val, hlt⟩ (by simp [truncate]; exact hi)
            omega
          · have : i.val = n := Nat.eq_of_lt_succ_of_not_lt i.isLt hlt
            rw [this]; simp [show w ⟨n, Nat.lt_succ_self n⟩ = true from by
              have : i = ⟨n, Nat.lt_succ_self n⟩ := Fin.ext this
              rw [← this]; exact hi]

theorem maxFiberMultiplicity_le_fib (m : Nat) :

  induction m using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | _ m ih =>
    match m with
    | 0 => rw [X.maxFiberMultiplicity_zero]; exact one_le_fib_succ 1
    | 1 => rw [X.maxFiberMultiplicity_one]; exact one_le_fib_succ 2
    | m + 2 =>
      have h1 := ih (m + 1) (by omega)
      have h2 := ih m (by omega)
      have hle := X.maxFiberMultiplicity_le_add m
      have hfib := fib_succ_succ' (m + 2)
      rw [show m + 2 + 2 = m + 4 from rfl, show m + 2 + 1 = m + 3 from rfl] at hfib
      linarith

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem popcount_le_half (x : X m) : (wordSupport x.1).card ≤ (m + 1) / 2
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  -- Proof by strong induction on m.
  -- Key: No11 means no two adjacent bits are true.
  -- For m+2: at most one of the last two bits is true.
  -- If last bit false: popcount = popcount(truncate x) ≤ ((m+1)+1)/2 = (m+2)/2
  --   and (m+2)/2 ≤ (m+3)/2 = ((m+2)+1)/2. ✓
  -- If last bit true: second-to-last must be false (No11).
  --   popcount = popcount(truncate(truncate x)) + 1 ≤ (m+1)/2 + 1
  --   and (m+1)/2 + 1 = (m+3)/2 when m odd, = (m+2)/2 ≤ (m+3)/2 when m even. ✓
  induction m using Nat.strongRecOn with
  | _ m ih =>
    match m with
    | 0 => simp [wordSupport]
    | 1 =>
      calc (wordSupport x.1).card
          ≤ (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin 1)).card := Finset.card_filter_le _ _
        _ = 1 := by simp
    | m + 2 =>
      -- Use popcount_truncate_le: (wordSupport (truncate w)).card ≤ (wordSupport w).card
      -- Strategy: bound popcount by IH at m+1 (last bit false) or m (last bit true)
      by_cases hLast : x.1 ⟨m + 1, by omega⟩ = true
      · -- Last bit true → second-to-last false by No11
        have hPrev : x.1 ⟨m, by omega⟩ = false := by
          by_contra hc; push_neg at hc
          have ht : x.1 ⟨m, by omega⟩ = true := by cases hb : x.1 ⟨m, by omega⟩ <;> simp_all
          have hg1 : get x.1 m = true := by rw [get]; simp [show m < m + 2 from by omega]; exact ht
          have hg2 : get x.1 (m + 1) = true := by rw [get]; simp [show m + 1 < m + 2 from by omega]; exact hLast
          exact x.2 m hg1 hg2
        -- Every true bit at position < m is also a true bit of truncate(truncate x)
        -- Plus the one true bit at position m+1
        -- So wordSupport x ⊆ (image of wordSupport(trunc²x)) ∪ {m+1}
        -- Card ≤ card(trunc²x support) + 1 ≤ (m+1)/2 + 1
        have htrunc2 := ih m (by omega) ⟨truncate (truncate x.1), no11_truncate (no11_truncate x.2)⟩
        -- Need: card ≤ card_trunc + 1 ≤ (m+1)/2 + 1 = (m+3)/2
        suffices hsuff : (wordSupport x.1).card ≤
            (wordSupport (truncate (truncate x.1))).card + 1 by
          calc (wordSupport x.1).card ≤ _ + 1 := hsuff
            _ ≤ (m + 1) / 2 + 1 := Nat.add_le_add_right htrunc2 1
            _ = (m + 2 + 1) / 2 := by omega
        -- wordSupport x ⊆ (Fin.castSucc ∘ Fin.castSucc '' wordSupport(trunc²x)) ∪ {⟨m+1,_⟩}
        calc (wordSupport x.1).card
            ≤ ((wordSupport (truncate (truncate x.1))).image
                (fun i : Fin m => (⟨i.val, by omega⟩ : Fin (m + 2))) ∪
               {⟨m + 1, by omega⟩}).card := by
              apply Finset.card_le_card; intro ⟨i, hi⟩ hmem
              simp only [wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hmem
              simp only [Finset.mem_union, Finset.mem_image, Finset.mem_singleton, Fin.ext_iff,
                wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and]
              by_cases him : i < m
              · left; exact ⟨⟨i, him⟩, by simp [truncate]; exact hmem, rfl⟩
              · right
                have : i = m ∨ i = m + 1 := by omega
                rcases this with rfl | rfl
                · -- Position m is false
                  exact absurd hmem (by simp [hPrev])
                · rfl
          _ ≤ (wordSupport (truncate (truncate x.1))).card + 1 := by
              calc _ ≤ ((wordSupport (truncate (truncate x.1))).image _).card +
                       ({⟨m + 1, by omega⟩} : Finset (Fin (m + 2))).card :=
                      Finset.card_union_le _ _
                _ ≤ (wordSupport (truncate (truncate x.1))).card + 1 := by
                      apply Nat.add_le_add_right
                      exact Finset.card_image_le
      · -- Last bit false: popcount ≤ popcount(truncate x)
        have hFalse : x.1 ⟨m + 1, by omega⟩ = false := by
          cases hb : x.1 ⟨m + 1, by omega⟩ <;> simp_all
        have htrunc := ih (m + 1) (by omega) ⟨truncate x.1, no11_truncate x.2⟩
        calc (wordSupport x.1).card
            ≤ (wordSupport (truncate x.1)).card := by
              -- All true bits of x have index < m+1 (since position m+1 is false)
              -- so wordSupport x injects into wordSupport(truncate x)
              have hmem_bound : ∀ i ∈ wordSupport x.1, i.val < m + 1 := by
                intro ⟨i, hi⟩ hmem
                simp only [wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hmem
                by_contra hge; push_neg at hge
                have heq : i = m + 1 := Nat.le_antisymm (by omega) hge
                have : x.1 ⟨m + 1, by omega⟩ = true := by rwa [show (⟨i, hi⟩ : Fin (m+2)) = ⟨m+1, by omega⟩ from Fin.ext heq] at hmem
                rw [hFalse] at this; exact absurd this (by decide)
              -- Use Fin.castSucc embedding from Fin(m+1) to Fin(m+2) in reverse
              -- All elements of wordSupport x have index < m+1
              rw [show (wordSupport x.1) = (wordSupport (truncate x.1)).image Fin.castSucc from by
                ext ⟨i, hi⟩; simp only [wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and,
                  Finset.mem_image, Fin.castSucc]
                constructor
                · intro hmem
                  have hlt := hmem_bound ⟨i, hi⟩ (by simp [wordSupport, Finset.mem_filter]; exact hmem)
                  exact ⟨⟨i, hlt⟩, by simp [truncate]; exact hmem, Fin.ext rfl⟩
                · rintro ⟨⟨j, hj⟩, hmem, heq⟩
                  simp [Fin.ext_iff] at heq; subst heq
                  simp [truncate] at hmem; exact hmem]
              exact Finset.card_image_le
          _ ≤ ((m + 1) + 1) / 2 := htrunc
          _ ≤ ((m + 2) + 1) / 2 := by omega
discoveries.docstring:
No11 words have at most ⌈m/2⌉ true bits.
    thm:pom-fiber-indset-factorization

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem popcount_le_weight (w : Word m) : popcount w ≤ weight w
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [weight_eq_fib_sum]
  simp only [popcount, wordSupport]
  -- Σ_{i ∈ support} F(i+2) ≥ Σ_{i ∈ support} 1 = |support| = popcount
  calc (Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true)).card
      = ∑ _ ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true), 1 := by simp
    _ ≤ ∑ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true), Nat.fib (i.val + 2) := by
        apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _; exact fib_succ_pos (i.val + 1)
discoveries.docstring:
popcount(w) ≤ weight(w): each true bit contributes F(i+2) ≥ 1 to weight.
    bridge:popcount-weight

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_fibonacci_cube_equiv (m : Nat) :
    Nonempty (X m ≃ PathIndSets m)
discoveries.docstring:
Paper label: X_m ≃ path-independent sets on P_m.
    def:pom-fibonacci-cube

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_fibonacci_cube (m : Nat) :
    Fintype.card (X m) = Nat.fib (m + 2) ∧ Nonempty (X m ≃ PathIndSets m)
discoveries.docstring:
Paper: |X_m| = F_{m+2} and X_m ≃ PathIndSets.
    def:pom-fibonacci-cube

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem maxFiber_lt_wordcount (m : Nat) (hm : 2 ≤ m) :
    X.maxFiberMultiplicity m < 2 ^ m
discoveries.docstring: D(m) < 2^m for all m ≥ 2. cor:pom-max-fiber-rate-endpoint.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem weight_le_popcount_mul_fib (w : Word m) (_hm : 1 ≤ m) :
    weight w ≤ popcount w * Nat.fib (m + 1)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [weight_eq_fib_ite_sum, popcount_eq_count_true]
  -- Bound: Σ (if w i then fib(i+2) else 0) ≤ |support| * fib(m+1)
  -- = Σ_{i ∈ support} fib(m+1)
  -- Strategy: each contributing term fib(i+2) ≤ fib(m+1) since i < m
  trans (∑ i : Fin m, if w i = true then Nat.fib (m + 1) else 0)
  · apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro i _
    by_cases hi : w i = true
    · simp [hi, Nat.fib_mono (show i.val + 2 ≤ m + 1 by omega)]
    · simp [show w i = false from by cases hw : w i <;> simp_all]
  · -- Σ (if w i = true then fib(m+1) else 0) = |support| * fib(m+1)
    trans ((Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true)).sum
        (fun _ => Nat.fib (m + 1)))
    · rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not (s := Finset.univ)
          (p := fun i : Fin m => w i = true)
          (f := fun i : Fin m => if w i = true then Nat.fib (m + 1) else 0)]
      have h1 : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => w i = true),
          (if w i = true then Nat.fib (m + 1) else 0) = Nat.fib (m + 1) :=
        fun i hi => by simp [Finset.mem_filter.mp hi |>.2]
      have h2 : ∀ i ∈ Finset.univ.filter (fun i : Fin m => ¬w i = true),
          (if w i = true then Nat.fib (m + 1) else 0) = 0 :=
        fun i hi => by simp [Finset.mem_filter.mp hi |>.2]
      rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl h1, Finset.sum_congr rfl h2]
      simp [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul]
    · rw [Finset.sum_const, smul_eq_mul]
