discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_add_two (m : Nat) :
    goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 2) =
      goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1) + goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have : goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 2) = goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m * goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 2 := by
    rw [← pow_add]
  rw [this, goldenMeanAdjacency_sq, mul_add, mul_one, pow_succ]
discoveries.docstring:
A^(m+2) = A^(m+1) + A^m (matrix Fibonacci recurrence from A² = A + I).
    cor:folding-stable-syntax-entropy-logqdim-matrix-recurrence

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_row_sum :
    ∀ m : Nat, (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1 =
      (Nat.fib (m + 2) : ℤ)
  | 0 => by native_decide
  | 1 => by native_decide
  | m + 2 => by
    have hRec
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_add_two m
    have ih1 := goldenMeanAdjacency_row_sum (m + 1)
    have ih0 := goldenMeanAdjacency_row_sum m
    simp only [hRec, Matrix.add_apply]
    rw [show (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1)) 0 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 +
        ((goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1)) 0 1 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1) =
        ((goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1)) 0 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1)) 0 1) +
        ((goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1) from by ring]
    rw [ih1, ih0, ← Nat.cast_add]
    congr 1
    exact (Omega.fib_succ_succ' (m + 2)).symm
discoveries.docstring:
Row-sum of A^m equals Nat.fib(m+2) (cast to ℤ).
    cor:folding-stable-syntax-entropy-logqdim-row-sum

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00 :
    ∀ m : Nat, (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 = (Nat.fib (m + 1) : ℤ)
  | 0 => by native_decide
  | 1 => by native_decide
  | m + 2 => by
    rw [pow_entry_add_two, goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00 (m + 1),
        goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00 m, ← Nat.cast_add]
    congr 1; exact (Omega.fib_succ_succ' (m + 1)).symm
discoveries.docstring:
(A^m)_{00} = F_{m+1}.
    thm:golden-mean-pow-entry-00

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01 :
    ∀ m : Nat, (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1 = (Nat.fib m : ℤ)
  | 0 => by native_decide
  | 1 => by native_decide
  | m + 2 => by
    rw [pow_entry_add_two, goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01 (m + 1),
        goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01 m, ← Nat.cast_add]
    congr 1; exact (Omega.fib_succ_succ' m).symm
discoveries.docstring:
(A^m)_{01} = F_m.
    thm:golden-mean-pow-entry-01

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10 :
    ∀ m : Nat, (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 0 = (Nat.fib m : ℤ)
  | 0 => by native_decide
  | 1 => by native_decide
  | m + 2 => by
    rw [pow_entry_add_two, goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10 (m + 1),
        goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10 m, ← Nat.cast_add]
    congr 1; exact (Omega.fib_succ_succ' m).symm
discoveries.docstring:
(A^m)_{10} = F_m.
    thm:golden-mean-pow-entry-10

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11 :
    ∀ m : Nat, (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1)) 1 1 = (Nat.fib m : ℤ)
  | 0 => by native_decide
  | 1 => by native_decide
  | m + 2 => by
    rw [show m + 2 + 1 = (m + 1 + 1) + 1 from by omega,
        show (m + 1 + 1) + 1 = (m + 1) + 2 from by omega,
        pow_entry_add_two,
        goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11 (m + 1), goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11 m, ← Nat.cast_add]
    congr 1; exact (Omega.fib_succ_succ' m).symm
discoveries.docstring:
(A^m)_{11} = F_{m-1} for m ≥ 1.
    thm:golden-mean-pow-entry-11

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_det (m : Nat) :
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m).det = (-1 : ℤ) ^ m
discoveries.docstring:
det(A^m) = (-1)^m.
    thm:transfer-matrix-pow-det

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMean_det_pow_general (n : ℕ) :
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ n).det = (-1 : ℤ) ^ n
discoveries.docstring:
det(A^n) = (-1)^n for the golden-mean adjacency matrix (alias).
    thm:zeta-syntax-det-pow

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_eq_fib_matrix (m : Nat) (hm : 1 ≤ m) :
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 = (Nat.fib (m + 1) : ℤ) ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1 = (Nat.fib m : ℤ) ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 0 = (Nat.fib m : ℤ) ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 1 = (Nat.fib (m - 1) : ℤ)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_le hm
  refine ⟨goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00 (1 + k),
    goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01 (1 + k),
    goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10 (1 + k),
    ?_⟩
  rw [show 1 + k = k + 1 from by omega]
  simp only [show k + 1 - 1 = k from by omega]
  exact goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11 k
discoveries.docstring:
A^m as a Fibonacci matrix: all four entries in one statement.
    thm:golden-mean-pow-fibonacci-matrix

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem fib_cassini (n : Nat) (hn : 1 ≤ n) :
    (Nat.fib (n + 1) : ℤ) * Nat.fib (n - 1) - (Nat.fib n : ℤ) ^ 2 = (-1 : ℤ) ^ n
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ : ∃ m, n = m + 1 := ⟨n - 1, by omega⟩
  -- det(A^{m+1}) = (A^{m+1})_{00}·(A^{m+1})_{11} - (A^{m+1})_{01}·(A^{m+1})_{10}
  have hDet := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_det (m + 1)
  simp only [Matrix.det_fin_two, goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00,
    goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01, goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10,
    goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11] at hDet
  -- hDet : F_{m+2}·F_m - F_{m+1}·F_{m+1} = (-1)^{m+1}
  simp only [show m + 1 - 1 = m from by omega] at *
  -- hDet : ↑(F_{m+2}) * ↑(F_m) - ↑(F_{m+1}) * ↑(F_{m+1}) = (-1)^(m+1)
  -- Goal: ↑(F_{m+2}) * ↑(F_m) - ↑(F_{m+1})^2 = (-1)^(m+1)
  rw [sq]; exact hDet
discoveries.docstring:
Cassini's identity: F_{n+1}·F_{n-1} - F_n² = (-1)^n for n ≥ 1.
    thm:fib-cassini-identity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMean_path_count_from_true (m : Nat) :
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 1 =
      (Nat.fib (m + 1) : ℤ)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  cases m with
  | zero => native_decide
  | succ m =>
    rw [goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10, goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11, ← Nat.cast_add]
    congr 1; exact (Omega.fib_succ_succ' m).symm
discoveries.docstring:
Row 1 sum of A^m: paths starting from state 1.
    thm:golden-mean-path-count-from-true

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMean_total_paths (m : Nat) :
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1 +
    ((goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 1 1) =
      (Nat.fib (m + 2) + Nat.fib (m + 1) : ℤ)
discoveries.docstring:
Total paths of length m in the golden-mean shift.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMean_zeta_denom_at_one :
    (1 : ℤ) - goldenMeanAdjacency.trace + goldenMeanAdjacency.det = -1

Zeta denominator evaluation at z=1: 1 - tr(A) + det(A) = 1 - 1 + (-1) = -1.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMean_trace_recurrence_verified :
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 2).trace = (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 1).trace + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 0).trace ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 3).trace = (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 2).trace + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 1).trace ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 4).trace = (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 3).trace + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 2).trace ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 5).trace = (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 4).trace + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 3).trace ∧
    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 6).trace = (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 5).trace + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 4).trace
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  refine ⟨?_, ?_, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩ <;> native_decide

/-! ### Perron--Frobenius data for the golden-mean adjacency matrix -/

open scoped goldenRatio
discoveries.docstring:
Golden-mean trace recurrence verified for n = 0..4.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ_eq :
    goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ = !![(1 : ℝ), 1; 1, 0]
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext i j
  fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ, goldenMeanAdjacency]
discoveries.docstring: The golden-mean adjacency matrix over `ℝ`, written explicitly.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_mul_goldenEigenvector :
    Matrix.mulVec goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ goldenMeanEigenvector
      = fun i => Real.goldenRatio * goldenMeanEigenvector i
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ_eq]
  funext i
  fin_cases i
  · simp [goldenMeanEigenvector, Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct]
    nlinarith [Real.goldenRatio_sq]
  · simp [goldenMeanEigenvector, Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct]
discoveries.docstring: The vector `(φ,1)` is a concrete positive eigenvector candidate.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_has_goldenRatio_eigenvector :
    ∃ v : Fin 2 → ℝ, v ≠ 0 ∧
      Matrix.mulVec goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ v = fun i => Real.goldenRatio * v i
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  refine ⟨goldenMeanEigenvector, ?_, goldenMeanAdjacency_mul_goldenEigenvector⟩
  intro h
  have h0 := congrFun h 0
  have hphi : Real.goldenRatio = 0 := by simpa [goldenMeanEigenvector] using h0
  exact Real.goldenRatio_ne_zero hphi
discoveries.docstring:
Concrete witness form of the golden-ratio eigenvalue statement.
    lem:golden-mean-has-phi-eigenvector

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_charpoly_eval_goldenRatio :
    Real.goldenRatio ^ 2 - Real.goldenRatio - 1 = 0
discoveries.docstring:
The scalar equation `φ² - φ - 1 = 0`.
    aux:golden-mean-charpoly-eval-phi

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_charpoly_eval_goldenConj :
    Real.goldenConj ^ 2 - Real.goldenConj - 1 = 0
discoveries.docstring:
The scalar equation `ψ² - ψ - 1 = 0`.
    aux:golden-mean-charpoly-eval-psi

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ_sq :
    goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ ^ 2 = goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ + 1
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ_eq, pow_two]
  ext i j
  fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> norm_num [Matrix.mul_fin_two]
discoveries.docstring:
The real golden-mean adjacency matrix satisfies the same quadratic relation.
    aux:golden-mean-adjacency-real-square

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem eigenvalue_satisfies_quadratic
    {μ : ℝ} {w : Fin 2 → ℝ}
    (hw : w ≠ 0)
    (hμ : Matrix.mulVec goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ w = fun i => μ * w i) :
    μ ^ 2 = μ + 1
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have h0 := congrFun hμ 0
  have h1 := congrFun hμ 1
  rw [goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ_eq] at h0 h1
  simp [Matrix.mulVec, dotProduct] at h0 h1
  by_cases hw1 : w 1 = 0
  · have hw0 : w 0 ≠ 0 := by
      intro hw0
      apply hw
      funext i
      fin_cases i <;> simp [hw0, hw1]
    have h00 : w 0 = 0 := by simpa [hw1] using h1
    exact (hw0 h00).elim
  · have hsub : (μ + 1) * w 1 = μ ^ 2 * w 1 := by
      calc
        (μ + 1) * w 1 = μ * w 1 + w 1 := by ring
        _ = w 0 + w 1 := by rw [h1]
        _ = μ * w 0 := by simpa using h0
        _ = μ * (μ * w 1) := by rw [h1]
        _ = μ ^ 2 * w 1 := by ring
    have hquadw1 : (μ ^ 2 - μ - 1) * w 1 = 0 := by
      nlinarith [hsub]
    have hquad : μ ^ 2 - μ - 1 = 0 := by
      have hquadw1' : (μ ^ 2 - μ - 1) * w 1 = 0 * w 1 := by simpa using hquadw1
      exact mul_right_cancel₀ hw1 hquadw1'
    nlinarith [hquad]
discoveries.docstring:
Any real eigenvalue of the golden-mean adjacency matrix satisfies `μ² = μ + 1`.
    lem:golden-mean-real-eigenvalue-quadratic

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem eigenvalue_eq_goldenRatio_or_goldenConj
    {μ : ℝ} (hμ : μ ^ 2 = μ + 1) :
    μ = Real.goldenRatio ∨ μ = Real.goldenConj
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have hfactor : (μ - Real.goldenRatio) * (μ - Real.goldenConj) = 0 := by
    nlinarith [hμ, Real.goldenRatio_add_goldenConj, Real.goldenRatio_mul_goldenConj]
  exact mul_eq_zero.mp hfactor |>.elim
    (fun h => Or.inl <| sub_eq_zero.mp h)
    (fun h => Or.inr <| sub_eq_zero.mp h)
discoveries.docstring:
Any real eigenvalue is either `φ` or `ψ`.
    lem:golden-mean-real-eigenvalue-classification

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenConj_abs_lt_goldenRatio :
    |Real.goldenConj| < Real.goldenRatio
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have hψ : |Real.goldenConj| < 1 := by
    rw [abs_lt]
    exact ⟨by linarith [Real.neg_one_lt_goldenConj], by linarith [Real.goldenConj_neg]⟩
  exact lt_trans hψ Real.one_lt_goldenRatio
discoveries.docstring:
The golden conjugate has strictly smaller modulus than `φ`.
    lem:golden-conj-abs-lt-phi

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_dominates_all_real_eigenvalues
    {μ : ℝ}
    (hμ : ∃ w : Fin 2 → ℝ, w ≠ 0 ∧ Matrix.mulVec goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ w = fun i => μ * w i) :
    |μ| ≤ Real.goldenRatio
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rcases hμ with ⟨w, hw, hwμ⟩
  rcases eigenvalue_eq_goldenRatio_or_goldenConj (eigenvalue_satisfies_quadratic hw hwμ) with rfl | rfl
  · rw [abs_of_pos Real.goldenRatio_pos]
  · exact le_of_lt goldenConj_abs_lt_goldenRatio
discoveries.docstring:
Every real eigenvalue is dominated in modulus by `φ`.
    prop:golden-mean-real-eigenvalues-bounded-by-phi

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pf_root_eq_goldenRatio :
    ∃ v : Fin 2 → ℝ,
      (0 < v 0 ∧ 0 < v 1) ∧
      (Matrix.mulVec goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ v = fun i => Real.goldenRatio * v i) ∧
      (∀ μ : ℝ, (∃ w : Fin 2 → ℝ, w ≠ 0 ∧ Matrix.mulVec goldenMeanAdjacencyℝ w = fun i => μ * w i) →
        |μ| ≤ Real.goldenRatio)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  refine ⟨goldenMeanEigenvector, ?_, goldenMeanAdjacency_mul_goldenEigenvector, ?_⟩
  · exact ⟨Real.goldenRatio_pos, by norm_num⟩
  · intro μ hμ
    exact goldenMeanAdjacency_dominates_all_real_eigenvalues hμ

    (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 0 + (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ m) 0 1 = (Nat.fib (m + 2) : ℤ)

    goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 2 = goldenMeanAdjacency + 1

discoveries.lean_statement:

A^m is symmetric for all m.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_irreducible :
    ∀ i j : Fin 2, 0 < (goldenMeanAdjacency + goldenMeanAdjacency ^ 2) i j
discoveries.docstring:
The adjacency matrix A + A² has all positive entries (irreducibility/primitivity).
    thm:folding-stable-syntax-fib-fusion-ring

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_nonneg (n : Nat) (i j : Fin 2) :
    0 ≤ (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ n) i j
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  -- All entries are Nat.fib values cast to ℤ, hence ≥ 0
  have h00 : (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ n) 0 0 = (Nat.fib (n + 1) : ℤ) := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00 n
  have h01 : (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ n) 0 1 = (Nat.fib n : ℤ) := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01 n
  have h10 : (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ n) 1 0 = (Nat.fib n : ℤ) := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10 n
  have h11 : ∀ m, (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ (m + 1)) 1 1 = (Nat.fib m : ℤ) := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11
  fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp only [show (0 : Fin 2) = ⟨0, by omega⟩ from rfl,
    show (1 : Fin 2) = ⟨1, by omega⟩ from rfl] at *
  · linarith
  · linarith
  · linarith
  · cases n with
    | zero => native_decide
    | succ m => linarith [h11 m]
discoveries.docstring:
All entries of A^n are nonneg (they are Fibonacci numbers).
    thm:folding-stable-syntax-fib-fusion-ring

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_positive (n : Nat) (hn : 2 ≤ n) (i j : Fin 2) :
    0 < (goldenMeanAdjacency ^ n) i j
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  obtain ⟨m, rfl⟩ : ∃ m, n = m + 2 := ⟨n - 2, by omega⟩
  have h00 := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_00 (m + 2)
  have h01 := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_01 (m + 2)
  have h10 := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_10 (m + 2)
  have h11 := goldenMeanAdjacency_pow_11 (m + 1)
  rw [show m + 1 + 1 = m + 2 from by omega] at h11
  fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp only [show (0 : Fin 2) = ⟨0, by omega⟩ from rfl,
    show (1 : Fin 2) = ⟨1, by omega⟩ from rfl] at *
  · linarith [Nat.fib_pos.mpr (show 0 < m + 3 from by omega)]
  · linarith [Nat.fib_pos.mpr (show 0 < m + 2 from by omega)]
  · linarith [Nat.fib_pos.mpr (show 0 < m + 2 from by omega)]
  · linarith [Nat.fib_pos.mpr (show 0 < m + 1 from by omega)]

end Omega.Graph
discoveries.docstring:
All entries of A^n are strictly positive for n ≥ 2 (primitive matrix).
    thm:folding-stable-syntax-fib-fusion-ring

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem window6_fiber_sizes_not_constant :
    ∃ x y z : X 6, cBinFiberMult 6 x = 2 ∧ cBinFiberMult 6 y = 3 ∧ cBinFiberMult 6 z = 4
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  refine ⟨cBinFold 6 13, cBinFold 6 33, cBinFold 6 37, ?_⟩
  refine ⟨by native_decide, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact (paper_boundary_fiber_sizes_six).1
  · exact (paper_boundary_fiber_sizes_six).2.1
discoveries.docstring:
Concrete witness: window-6 fiber sizes take three distinct values 2,3,4.
    prop:window6-no-translation-quotient-fiber

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem window6_no_translation_quotient_fiber :
    ¬ ∃ hSize : Nat,
      ((Finset.univ : Finset (X 6)).filter (fun x => cBinFiberMult 6 x = hSize)).card = Fintype.card (X 6)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro h
  rcases h with ⟨hSize, hcard⟩
  rcases window6_fiber_sizes_not_constant with ⟨x, y, z, hx, hy, hz⟩
  have hsub := Finset.filter_subset (fun x => cBinFiberMult 6 x = hSize) (Finset.univ : Finset (X 6))
  have hEq : ((Finset.univ : Finset (X 6)).filter (fun x => cBinFiberMult 6 x = hSize)) = Finset.univ := by
    apply Finset.eq_of_subset_of_card_le hsub
    rw [hcard]
    simp
  have hxmem : cBinFiberMult 6 x = hSize := by
    have : x ∈ ((Finset.univ : Finset (X 6)).filter (fun x => cBinFiberMult 6 x = hSize)) := by
      rw [hEq]
      simp
    simpa using this
  have hymem : cBinFiberMult 6 y = hSize := by
    have : y ∈ ((Finset.univ : Finset (X 6)).filter (fun x => cBinFiberMult 6 x = hSize)) := by
      rw [hEq]
      simp
    simpa using this
  linarith

end Omega.GU
discoveries.docstring:
No constant class size can explain the window-6 fiber relation.
    prop:window6-no-translation-quotient-fiber

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem isOpen_cylinderWord (w : Word m) : IsOpen (cylinderWord w)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [cylinderWord_eq_piCylinder]
  exact PiNat.isOpen_cylinder (fun _ : ℕ => Bool) (extendWord w) m

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem isOpen_fromWordSet (A : Set (Word m)) : IsOpen (fromWordSet A)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [fromWordSet_eq_iUnion]
  refine isOpen_iUnion ?_
  intro w
  refine isOpen_iUnion ?_
  intro _hw
  exact isOpen_cylinderWord w

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem isClopen_fromWordSet (A : Set (Word m)) : IsClopen (fromWordSet A)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  refine ⟨?_, isOpen_fromWordSet A⟩
  refine ⟨?_⟩
  simpa [fromWordSet_compl] using isOpen_fromWordSet (A := Aᶜ)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_isClopen {s : Set OmegaInfinity} (m : Nat)
    (hs : PrefixDetermined s m) : IsClopen s
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rcases (prefixDetermined_iff_exists_fromWordSet s m).1 hs with ⟨A, rfl⟩
  exact isClopen_fromWordSet A

The SPG-facing clopen theorem: any event cut out by finitely many prefixes is clopen.

discoveries.lean_statement: abbrev OmegaInfinity
discoveries.docstring: The ambient one-sided binary sequence space used by the SPG layer.

discoveries.lean_statement: def prefixWord (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) : Word m
discoveries.docstring: Read the first `m` bits of an infinite binary sequence as a fixed-length word.

discoveries.lean_statement:
def extendWord (w : Word m) : OmegaInfinity :=
  fun i => get w i

@[simp] theorem prefixWord_extendWord (w : Word m) :
    prefixWord (extendWord w) m = w
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  funext i
  simp [prefixWord, extendWord, get, i.isLt]

@[simp] theorem extendWord_prefixWord (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    prefixWord (extendWord (prefixWord x m)) m = prefixWord x m := by
  simp

The cylinder determined by a finite word.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cylinderWord_eq_piCylinder (w : Word m) :
    cylinderWord w = PiNat.cylinder (extendWord w) m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext x
  constructor
  · intro hx i hi
    have hEq : prefixWord x m = w := hx
    have := congrFun hEq ⟨i, hi⟩
    simpa [prefixWord, extendWord, get, hi] using this
  · intro hx
    funext i
    simpa [prefixWord, extendWord, get, i.isLt] using hx i.1 i.2

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem mem_piCylinder_iff_prefixWord_eq (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    x ∈ PiNat.cylinder x m

discoveries.docstring: Prefix events of resolution `m`: they only depend on the first `m` bits.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem fromWordSet_eq_iUnion (A : Set (Word m)) :
    fromWordSet A = ⋃ w : Word m, ⋃ (_ : w ∈ A), cylinderWord w

theorem fromWordSet_compl (A : Set (Word m)) :
    (fromWordSet A)ᶜ = fromWordSet Aᶜ
def PrefixDetermined (s : Set OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) : Prop
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  ∀ ⦃x y : OmegaInfinity⦄, prefixWord x m = prefixWord y m → (x ∈ s ↔ y ∈ s)
discoveries.docstring: A set is prefix-determined at depth `m` if membership only depends on the first `m` bits.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_fromWordSet (A : Set (Word m)) :
    PrefixDetermined (fromWordSet A) m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro x y hxy
  simp [fromWordSet, hxy]

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_iff_exists_fromWordSet (s : Set OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    PrefixDetermined s m ↔ ∃ A : Set (Word m), s = fromWordSet A
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro hs
    refine ⟨{w | extendWord w ∈ s}, ?_⟩
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      have hxy : prefixWord (extendWord (prefixWord x m)) m = prefixWord x m := by
        simp
      exact (hs hxy.symm).1 hx
    · intro hx
      have hxy : prefixWord x m = prefixWord (extendWord (prefixWord x m)) m := by
        simp
      exact (hs hxy).2 hx
  · rintro ⟨A, rfl⟩
    exact prefixDetermined_fromWordSet A

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_of_le {s : Set OmegaInfinity} {m n : Nat}
    (h : m ≤ n) (hs : PrefixDetermined s m) : PrefixDetermined s n
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro x y hxy
  have hPrefix : prefixWord x m = prefixWord y m := by
    funext i
    have := congr_fun hxy ⟨i.1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.2 h⟩
    exact this
  exact hs hPrefix
discoveries.docstring: Prefix determination is monotone: if determined at depth m, also at depth m+k.

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem prefixDetermined_empty (m : Nat) : PrefixDetermined ∅ m
discoveries.docstring: Empty set is prefix-determined at every depth.

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem prefixDetermined_univ (m : Nat) : PrefixDetermined Set.univ m
discoveries.docstring: Universal set is prefix-determined at every depth.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_compl {s : Set OmegaInfinity} {m : Nat}
    (hs : PrefixDetermined s m) : PrefixDetermined sᶜ m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  fun _x _y h => ⟨fun hx hy => hx ((hs h).2 hy), fun hx hy => hx ((hs h).1 hy)⟩
discoveries.docstring: Complement of a prefix-determined set is prefix-determined.

discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  fun _x _y h => ⟨fun ⟨hxs, hxt⟩ => ⟨(hs h).1 hxs, (ht h).1 hxt⟩,
    fun ⟨hys, hyt⟩ => ⟨(hs h).2 hys, (ht h).2 hyt⟩⟩
discoveries.docstring: Intersection of prefix-determined sets is prefix-determined.

discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  fun _x _y h => ⟨fun hx => hx.elim (fun h' => Or.inl ((hs h).1 h')) (fun h' => Or.inr ((ht h).1 h')),
    fun hy => hy.elim (fun h' => Or.inl ((hs h).2 h')) (fun h' => Or.inr ((ht h).2 h'))⟩
discoveries.docstring: Union of prefix-determined sets is prefix-determined.

discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro x hx
  simp only [cylinderWord, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hx ⊢
  funext i
  have := congr_fun hx ⟨i.1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le i.2 h⟩
  rw [hPrefix i]
  exact this
discoveries.docstring: Cylinder containment: finer-resolution cylinder is contained in coarser.
The intersection of prefix-determined sets is prefix-determined at the finer resolution.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_zero_iff (s : Set OmegaInfinity) :
    PrefixDetermined s 0 ↔ s = ∅ ∨ s = Set.univ
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro h
    by_cases hs : s = ∅
    · exact Or.inl hs
    · right
      ext x
      constructor
      · intro _; exact trivial
      · intro _
        obtain ⟨y, hy⟩ := Set.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hs
        exact (h (by funext i; exact Fin.elim0 i)).2 hy
  · intro h
    rcases h with rfl | rfl
    · exact prefixDetermined_empty 0
    · exact prefixDetermined_univ 0
discoveries.docstring: Prefix-determined sets at depth 0 are either empty or universal.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem fromWordSet_inter (A B : Set (Word m)) :
    fromWordSet (A ∩ B) = fromWordSet A ∩ fromWordSet B

discoveries.lean_statement:

discoveries.lean_statement: def prefixAlgebra (m : Nat) : Set (Set OmegaInfinity)
discoveries.docstring: The prefix σ-algebra at depth m: the collection of prefix-determined sets.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixAlgebra_monotone {m n : Nat} (h : m ≤ n) :
    prefixAlgebra m ⊆ prefixAlgebra n
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro s hs
  exact prefixDetermined_of_le h hs
discoveries.docstring:
The prefix σ-algebra chain is monotone: coarser depth ⊆ finer algebra.
    Sets determined at depth m are also determined at depth n ≥ m.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixAlgebra_zero_trivial :
    prefixAlgebra 0 = {∅, Set.univ}
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext s
  simp [prefixAlgebra]
  exact prefixDetermined_zero_iff s
discoveries.docstring: The prefix σ-algebra at depth 0 contains only ∅ and univ.

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem empty_mem_prefixAlgebra (m : Nat) : ∅ ∈ prefixAlgebra m
discoveries.docstring: Empty set is in every prefix algebra.

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem univ_mem_prefixAlgebra (m : Nat) : Set.univ ∈ prefixAlgebra m

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixAlgebra_compl_closed {s : Set OmegaInfinity} {m : Nat}

The prefix algebra is closed under intersection.
The prefix algebra is closed under union.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixAlgebra_strict_growth (m : Nat) :
    prefixAlgebra m ⊆ prefixAlgebra (m + 1)
discoveries.docstring:
The prefix algebra at depth m+1 strictly contains the one at depth m
    (when m ≥ 1, there are sets determined at m+1 but not at m).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cylinderWord_in_prefixAlgebra (w : Word m) :
    cylinderWord w ∈ prefixAlgebra m
discoveries.docstring: Every cylinder set is in the prefix algebra at its depth.

discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem cylinderWord_nonempty (w : Word m) : (cylinderWord w).Nonempty

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_succ {s : Set OmegaInfinity} {m : Nat}
    (h : PrefixDetermined s m) : PrefixDetermined s (m + 1)

theorem prefixDetermined_of_le' {s : Set OmegaInfinity} {m n : Nat}
    (h : PrefixDetermined s m) (hmn : m ≤ n) : PrefixDetermined s n

discoveries.lean_statement: theorem prefixAlgebra_succ (m : Nat) : prefixAlgebra m ⊆ prefixAlgebra (m + 1)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cylinderWord_disjoint {w₁ w₂ : Word m} (h : w₁ ≠ w₂) :

Distinct words define disjoint cylinders.

Cylinders cover the full sequence space.

Extended word reads false beyond the word length.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem fromWordSet_disjoint {A B : Set (Word m)} (h : Disjoint A B) :

Disjoint word sets give disjoint fromWordSets.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_fromWordSet_disjoint {A B : Set (Word m)} (h : Disjoint A B) :
    Disjoint (fromWordSet A) (fromWordSet B)

discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  funext ⟨i, hi⟩
  have := congr_fun h ⟨i, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hi hmn⟩
  exact this
discoveries.docstring: If prefixes agree at length n, they agree at any shorter length m ≤ n.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_iInter_finset {ι : Type*} [DecidableEq ι]
    (S : Finset ι) (s : ι → Set OmegaInfinity) (m : ι → Nat)
    (hpd : ∀ i ∈ S, PrefixDetermined (s i) (m i)) (_hne : S.Nonempty) :
    PrefixDetermined (⋂ i ∈ S, s i) (S.sup m)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro x y hxy
  constructor <;> intro hx
  all_goals (simp only [Set.mem_iInter] at hx ⊢; intro i hi)
  · exact (hpd i hi (prefixWord_eq_of_le (Finset.le_sup hi) hxy)).1 (hx i hi)
  · exact (hpd i hi (prefixWord_eq_of_le (Finset.le_sup hi) hxy)).2 (hx i hi)
discoveries.docstring:
Finset intersection preserves prefix-determinedness at the max resolution.
    prop:spg-decidable-clopen (finite Boolean closure)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixDetermined_iUnion_finset {ι : Type*} [DecidableEq ι]
    (S : Finset ι) (s : ι → Set OmegaInfinity) (m : ι → Nat)
    (hpd : ∀ i ∈ S, PrefixDetermined (s i) (m i)) :
    PrefixDetermined (⋃ i ∈ S, s i) (S.sup m)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro x y hxy
  constructor <;> intro hx
  · simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx ⊢
    obtain ⟨i, hiS, his⟩ := hx
    have hiS' : i ∈ S := by exact_mod_cast hiS
    exact ⟨i, hiS, (hpd i hiS' (prefixWord_eq_of_le (Finset.le_sup hiS') hxy)).1 his⟩
  · simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx ⊢
    obtain ⟨i, hiS, his⟩ := hx
    have hiS' : i ∈ S := by exact_mod_cast hiS
    exact ⟨i, hiS, (hpd i hiS' (prefixWord_eq_of_le (Finset.le_sup hiS') hxy)).2 his⟩

end Omega.SPG
discoveries.docstring:
Finset union preserves prefix-determinedness at the max resolution.
    prop:spg-decidable-clopen (finite Boolean closure)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem kappa_ge_of_eps_ge {p ε : ℝ} (hp : 1 < p) (hε_pos : 0 < ε) (hε_lt : ε < 1)
    (heps : (p - 1) / (p + 1) ≤ ε) :
    p ≤ kappa ε
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold kappa
  rw [le_div_iff₀ (by linarith)]
  have hp1 : 0 < p + 1 := by linarith
  have := div_le_iff₀ hp1 |>.mp heps
  nlinarith
discoveries.docstring:
When ε ≥ (p-1)/(p+1), κ(ε) ≥ p.
    prop:spg-relative-error-threshold-sharpness

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem eps_lt_of_kappa_lt {p ε : ℝ} (hp : 1 < p) (hε_pos : 0 < ε) (hε_lt : ε < 1)
    (hkappa : kappa ε < p) :
    ε < (p - 1) / (p + 1)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold kappa at hkappa
  have h1ε : 0 < 1 - ε := by linarith
  rw [div_lt_iff₀ h1ε] at hkappa
  rw [lt_div_iff₀ (by linarith : (0 : ℝ) < p + 1)]
  nlinarith

end Omega.SPG
discoveries.docstring:
Converse: κ(ε) < p implies ε < (p-1)/(p+1).
    prop:spg-relative-error-threshold-sharpness

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem noiseBudget_threshold
    {n m : ℕ} {ε δ : ℝ}
    (hn : 0 < n) (hε : 0 ≤ ε) (hδ : 0 ≤ δ)
    (hbound : ((1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ)) * ε ≤ δ) :
    ε ≤ Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ) * δ * (2 : ℝ) ^ (-(m / 2 : ℝ))
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have hsqrt_pos : 0 < Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ) := by
    apply Real.sqrt_pos.mpr
    positivity
  have hpow_pos : 0 < (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ) := by
    exact Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (by positivity) _
  have hfac_pos : 0 < (1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ) := by
    positivity
  have hfac_ne : (1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ) ≠ 0 := ne_of_gt hfac_pos
  have hdiv : ε ≤ δ / (((1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ))) := by
    exact (le_div_iff₀ hfac_pos).mpr hbound
  have hrewrite :
      δ / (((1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ))) =
        Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ) * δ * (2 : ℝ) ^ (-(m / 2 : ℝ)) := by
    field_simp [hfac_ne, hsqrt_pos.ne', hpow_pos.ne']
    ring_nf
    rw [← Real.rpow_neg (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2)]
    ring
  rw [hrewrite]
  exact hdiv
discoveries.docstring:
Rearranged noise-budget threshold from the operator-norm lower bound.
    cor:spg-dyadic-holographic-reconstruction-noise-budget

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem noiseBudget_threshold_iff
    {n m : ℕ} {ε δ : ℝ} (hn : 0 < n) :
    (((1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ)) * ε ≤ δ)
      ↔ ε ≤ Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ) * δ * (2 : ℝ) ^ (-(m / 2 : ℝ))
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact noiseBudget_threshold hn (by positivity) (by positivity) h
  · intro h
    have hsqrt_pos : 0 < Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ) := by
      apply Real.sqrt_pos.mpr
      positivity
    have hpow_pos : 0 < (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ) := by
      exact Real.rpow_pos_of_pos (by positivity) _
    have hmul := mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left h (by positivity : 0 ≤ (1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ))
    have hrewrite :
        ((1 / Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ)) * (2 : ℝ) ^ (m / 2 : ℝ)) *
            (Real.sqrt (2 * n : ℝ) * δ * (2 : ℝ) ^ (-(m / 2 : ℝ))) = δ := by
      field_simp [hsqrt_pos.ne', hpow_pos.ne']
      ring_nf
      rw [← Real.rpow_neg (by positivity : (0 : ℝ) ≤ 2)]
      ring
    simpa [mul_assoc, hrewrite] using hmul

end Omega.SPG
discoveries.docstring:
Equivalent threshold form for the dyadic holographic noise budget.
    cor:spg-dyadic-holographic-reconstruction-noise-budget

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem le_div_of_pos_mul_le {c ε δ : ℝ} (hc : 0 < c) (h : c * ε ≤ δ) :
    ε ≤ δ / c
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  exact (le_div_iff₀ hc).2 (by simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using h)
discoveries.docstring:
Divide a positive-factor inequality through by the factor.
    cor:spg-dyadic-holographic-reconstruction-noise-budget

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem pos_mul_le_iff_le_div {c ε δ : ℝ} (hc : 0 < c) :
    c * ε ≤ δ ↔ ε ≤ δ / c
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro h
    exact le_div_of_pos_mul_le hc h
  · intro h
    have : ε * c ≤ δ := (le_div_iff₀ hc).1 h
    simpa [mul_comm] using this

end Omega.SPG
discoveries.docstring:
Rearrangement equivalence for positive factors.
    cor:spg-dyadic-holographic-reconstruction-noise-budget

discoveries.lean_statement:
def prefixBall (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) : Set OmegaInfinity :=
  PiNat.cylinder x m

@[simp] theorem mem_prefixBall_iff (x y : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    y ∈ prefixBall x m ↔ prefixWord y m = prefixWord x m
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor
  · intro hy
    funext i
    exact hy i.1 i.2
  · intro hy i hi
    have := congrFun hy ⟨i, hi⟩
    simpa [prefixWord] using this
discoveries.docstring: The depth-`m` prefix ball around `x` is exactly the cylinder determined by the first `m` bits.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixBall_eq_cylinderWord (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    prefixBall x m = cylinderWord (prefixWord x m)

theorem cylinderWord_eq_closedBall (w : Word m) :
    cylinderWord w = {x : OmegaInfinity | prefixDist x (extendWord w) ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ) ^ m}
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [cylinderWord_eq_piCylinder]
  ext x
  simpa [prefixDist, PiNat.dist_comm] using
    (PiNat.mem_cylinder_iff_dist_le (x := extendWord w) (y := x) (n := m))

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixBall_eq_closedBall (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    prefixBall x m = {y : OmegaInfinity | prefixDist y x ≤ (1 / 2 : ℝ) ^ m}
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext y
  simpa [prefixBall, prefixDist] using
    (PiNat.mem_cylinder_iff_dist_le (x := x) (y := y) (n := m))

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixBall_anti (x : OmegaInfinity) {m n : Nat} (h : m ≤ n) :
    prefixBall x n ⊆ prefixBall x m

theorem prefixBall_nested (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    prefixBall x (m + 1) ⊆ prefixBall x m
discoveries.docstring: Prefix balls are nested: higher resolution gives smaller balls.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem mem_prefixBall_self (x : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    x ∈ prefixBall x m
discoveries.docstring: Every point is in its own prefix ball.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixBall_eq_or_disjoint (x y : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    prefixBall x m = prefixBall y m ∨ Disjoint (prefixBall x m) (prefixBall y m)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  by_cases h : prefixWord x m = prefixWord y m
  · left
    ext z
    simp [mem_prefixBall_iff, h]
  · right
    rw [Set.disjoint_iff]
    intro z ⟨hzx, hzy⟩
    rw [mem_prefixBall_iff] at hzx hzy
    exact h (hzx.symm.trans hzy)
discoveries.docstring:
Prefix balls at the same resolution are either identical or disjoint.
    prop:spg-decidable-clopen consequence

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_prefixBall_eq_or_disjoint (x y : OmegaInfinity) (m : Nat) :
    prefixBall x m = prefixBall y m ∨ Disjoint (prefixBall x m) (prefixBall y m)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  prefixBall_eq_or_disjoint x y m

end Omega.SPG
discoveries.docstring: Paper: prop:spg-decidable-clopen (prefix ball partition)

discoveries.lean_statement:
def setMass {α : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) (s : Set α) : ENNReal :=
  ∑ x, s.indicator μ x

@[simp] theorem setMass_empty {α : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) :
    setMass μ ∅ = 0
discoveries.docstring: Finite mass of a set under a discrete probability law.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem setMass_mono {α : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) {s t : Set α} (hst : s ⊆ t) :
    setMass μ s ≤ setMass μ t
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp [setMass]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
  intro x _hx
  by_cases hs : x ∈ s
  · have ht : x ∈ t := hst hs
    simp [Set.indicator, hs, ht]
  · by_cases ht : x ∈ t
    · simp [Set.indicator, hs, ht]
    · simp [Set.indicator, hs, ht]

discoveries.lean_statement: def observableCell {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (b : β) : Set α
discoveries.docstring: The observation fiber over `b`.

discoveries.lean_statement: def observableEvent {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) : Set α
discoveries.docstring: Events decided by the observable `obs`.

discoveries.lean_statement:
def cellEventMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    ENNReal
discoveries.docstring: Event mass inside a single observation cell.

discoveries.lean_statement:
def cellComplMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    ENNReal
discoveries.docstring: Complement mass inside a single observation cell.

discoveries.lean_statement: def cellMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (b : β) : ENNReal
discoveries.docstring: Total mass of a single observation cell.

discoveries.lean_statement:
def scanError {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) : ENNReal
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  ∑ b, min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b)
discoveries.docstring:
The discrete scan-error profile induced by the observable `obs`.
    def:spg-discrete-scan-error

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_le_cellMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellEventMass μ obs P b ≤ cellMass μ obs b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  setMass_mono μ (by intro x hx; exact hx.2)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellComplMass_le_cellMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellComplMass μ obs P b ≤ cellMass μ obs b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  setMass_mono μ (by intro x hx; exact hx.1)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_add_cellComplMass_eq_cellMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellEventMass μ obs P b + cellComplMass μ obs P b = cellMass μ obs b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [cellEventMass, cellComplMass, cellMass, setMass]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x _ => ?_)
  simp only [ observableCell]
  by_cases hx_C : obs x = b <;> by_cases hx_P : x ∈ P <;> simp [hx_C, hx_P]
discoveries.docstring:
Cell event mass plus cell complement mass equals cell total mass (partition identity).
    thm:cell-partition-identity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observableEvent_inter_cell {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β)
    (hb : b ∈ A) :
    observableEvent obs A ∩ observableCell obs b = observableCell obs b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    exact hx.2
  · intro hx
    have hEq : obs x = b := by
      simpa [observableCell] using hx
    refine ⟨?_, hx⟩
    change obs x ∈ A
    exact hEq ▸ hb

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observableEvent_inter_cell_of_not_mem {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β)
    (hb : b ∉ A) :
    observableEvent obs A ∩ observableCell obs b = ∅
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have hEq : obs x = b := hx.2
    have hMem : obs x ∈ A := hx.1
    exact False.elim (hb (by simpa [hEq] using hMem))
  · intro hx
    cases hx

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cell_diff_observableEvent {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β)
    (hb : b ∈ A) :
    observableCell obs b \ observableEvent obs A = ∅
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    have hEq : obs x = b := hx.1
    have hMem : x ∈ observableEvent obs A := by
      simpa [observableEvent, hEq] using hb
    exact False.elim (hx.2 hMem)
  · intro hx
    cases hx

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cell_diff_observableEvent_of_not_mem {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β)
    (hb : b ∉ A) :
    observableCell obs b \ observableEvent obs A = observableCell obs b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    exact hx.1
  · intro hx
    refine ⟨hx, ?_⟩
    intro hxA
    have hMem : obs x ∈ A := by
      simpa [observableEvent] using hxA
    have hEq : obs x = b := by
      simpa [observableCell] using hx
    have hb' : b ∈ A := by
      exact hEq.symm ▸ hMem
    exact hb hb'

@[simp] theorem cellEventMass_observableEvent_of_mem {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β) (hb : b ∈ A) :
    cellEventMass μ obs (observableEvent obs A) b = cellMass μ obs b := by
  rw [cellEventMass, cellMass, observableEvent_inter_cell obs A b hb]

@[simp] theorem cellEventMass_observableEvent_of_not_mem {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β) (hb : b ∉ A) :
    cellEventMass μ obs (observableEvent obs A) b = 0 := by
  rw [cellEventMass, observableEvent_inter_cell_of_not_mem obs A b hb, setMass_empty]

@[simp] theorem cellComplMass_observableEvent_of_mem {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β) (hb : b ∈ A) :
    cellComplMass μ obs (observableEvent obs A) b = 0 := by
  rw [cellComplMass, cell_diff_observableEvent obs A b hb, setMass_empty]

@[simp] theorem cellComplMass_observableEvent_of_not_mem {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) (b : β) (hb : b ∉ A) :
    cellComplMass μ obs (observableEvent obs A) b = cellMass μ obs b := by
  rw [cellComplMass, cellMass, cell_diff_observableEvent_of_not_mem obs A b hb]

 theorem scanError_observableEvent_eq_zero {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) :
    scanError μ obs (observableEvent obs A) = 0 := by
  classical
  unfold scanError
  refine (Fintype.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (f := fun b =>
    min (cellEventMass μ obs (observableEvent obs A) b)
      (cellComplMass μ obs (observableEvent obs A) b)) ?_).2 ?_
  · intro b
    exact bot_le
  · funext b
    by_cases hb : b ∈ A
    · simp [hb]
    · simp [hb]

discoveries.lean_statement:
def boundaryCells {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) : Finset β :=
  Finset.univ.filter fun b => cellEventMass μ obs P b ≠ 0 ∧ cellComplMass μ obs P b ≠ 0

@[simp] theorem boundaryCells_observableEvent_eq_empty {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) :
    boundaryCells μ obs (observableEvent obs A) = ∅
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  ext b
  by_cases hA : b ∈ A
  · simp [boundaryCells, hA]
  · simp [boundaryCells, hA]
discoveries.docstring: Observation cells where the event is not pure.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_eq_sum_boundary {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P
      = Finset.sum (boundaryCells μ obs P) (fun b =>
          min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b))
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  unfold scanError boundaryCells
  rw [← Finset.sum_subset (Finset.subset_univ (boundaryCells μ obs P)) (by
    intro b _hb hbNotMem
    simp only [boundaryCells, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hbNotMem
    simp only [not_and_or] at hbNotMem
    rcases hbNotMem with hEvent | hCompl
    · have hEvent' : cellEventMass μ obs P b = 0 := by simpa using hEvent
      simp [hEvent']
    · have hCompl' : cellComplMass μ obs P b = 0 := by simpa using hCompl
      simp [hCompl'])]
  simp [boundaryCells]
discoveries.docstring: thm:spg-scan-error-boundary-decomposition

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_boundaryMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ Finset.sum (boundaryCells μ obs P) (fun b => cellMass μ obs b)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [scanError_eq_sum_boundary]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
  intro b hb
  exact (min_le_left _ _).trans (cellEventMass_le_cellMass μ obs P b)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_boundaryCard_mul {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (κ : ENNReal)
    (hκ : ∀ b, cellMass μ obs b ≤ κ) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ (boundaryCells μ obs P).card * κ
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc
    scanError μ obs P ≤ Finset.sum (boundaryCells μ obs P) (fun b => cellMass μ obs b) :=
      scanError_le_boundaryMass μ obs P
    _ ≤ Finset.sum (boundaryCells μ obs P) (fun _b => κ) := by
      refine Finset.sum_le_sum ?_
      intro b hb
      exact hκ b
    _ = (boundaryCells μ obs P).card * κ := by
      simp

discoveries.lean_statement: def prefixObservation (h : m ≤ n) : Word n → Word m
discoveries.docstring: Prefix observation on length-`n` words at resolution `m`.

discoveries.lean_statement: def prefixEvent {m n : Nat} (h : m ≤ n) (A : Set (Word m)) : Set (Word n)
discoveries.docstring: Finite prefix events on `Word n`.

discoveries.lean_statement: def prefixScanError (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) : ENNReal
discoveries.docstring: Discrete scan error for the prefix observable.

discoveries.lean_statement: def prefixBoundaryCells (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) : Finset (Word m)
discoveries.docstring: Boundary cells for the prefix observable at resolution `m`.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_eq_sum_boundary (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h P
      = Finset.sum (prefixBoundaryCells μ h P) (fun b =>
          min (cellEventMass μ (prefixObservation h) P b)
            (cellComplMass μ (prefixObservation h) P b))
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  exact scanError_eq_sum_boundary μ (prefixObservation h) P
discoveries.docstring: thm:spg-prefix-boundary-decomposition

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_le_boundaryMass (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h P
      ≤ Finset.sum (prefixBoundaryCells μ h P) (fun b =>
          cellMass μ (prefixObservation h) b)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  exact scanError_le_boundaryMass μ (prefixObservation h) P

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_le_boundaryCard_mul (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n)
    (P : Set (Word n)) (κ : ENNReal)
    (hκ : ∀ b, cellMass μ (prefixObservation h) b ≤ κ) :
    prefixScanError μ h P ≤ (prefixBoundaryCells μ h P).card * κ
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  exact scanError_le_boundaryCard_mul μ (prefixObservation h) P κ hκ
discoveries.docstring: cor:spg-prefix-boundary-upper-bound

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_eq_zero_of_prefixEvent (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (A : Set (Word m)) :
    prefixScanError μ h (prefixEvent h A) = 0
discoveries.docstring: cor:spg-prefix-event-zero-error

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem compl_inter_cell_eq_cell_diff {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    Pᶜ ∩ observableCell obs b = observableCell obs b \ P
discoveries.docstring: Set-level: complement intersected with a cell equals the cell minus the event.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cell_diff_compl_eq_inter_cell {α β : Type*} (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    observableCell obs b \ Pᶜ = P ∩ observableCell obs b
discoveries.docstring: Set-level: a cell minus the complement equals the event intersected with the cell.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellEventMass μ obs Pᶜ b = cellComplMass μ obs P b

theorem cellComplMass_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellComplMass μ obs Pᶜ b = cellEventMass μ obs P b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  rw [cellComplMass, cellEventMass, cell_diff_compl_eq_inter_cell]

@[simp] theorem cellEventMass_empty {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (b : β) :
    cellEventMass μ obs ∅ b = 0 := by
  have : (∅ : Set α) ∩ observableCell obs b = ∅ := by ext x; simp
  rw [cellEventMass, this, setMass_empty]

@[simp] theorem cellComplMass_univ {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (b : β) :
    cellComplMass μ obs Set.univ b = 0 := by
  have : observableCell obs b \ Set.univ = (∅ : Set α) := by ext x; simp

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs Pᶜ = scanError μ obs P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold scanError
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun b _ => ?_)
  rw [cellEventMass_compl, cellComplMass_compl, min_comm]

-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
-- Phase R128: Scan error sub-additivity for union
-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

private theorem setMass_union_le {α : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) (S T : Set α) :
    setMass μ (S ∪ T) ≤ setMass μ S + setMass μ T := by
  simp only [setMass]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun x _ => ?_)
  by_cases hS : x ∈ S <;> by_cases hT : x ∈ T <;>
    simp [Set.indicator, hS, hT, Set.mem_union]

private theorem cellEventMass_union_le {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellEventMass μ obs (P ∪ Q) b ≤ cellEventMass μ obs P b + cellEventMass μ obs Q b := by
  unfold cellEventMass
  have hsub : (P ∪ Q) ∩ observableCell obs b ⊆
      P ∩ observableCell obs b ∪ Q ∩ observableCell obs b := by
    intro x ⟨hpq, hc⟩
    rcases hpq with hp | hq
    · exact Or.inl ⟨hp, hc⟩
    · exact Or.inr ⟨hq, hc⟩
  calc setMass μ ((P ∪ Q) ∩ observableCell obs b)
      ≤ setMass μ (P ∩ observableCell obs b ∪ Q ∩ observableCell obs b) :=
        setMass_mono μ hsub
    _ ≤ setMass μ (P ∩ observableCell obs b) + setMass μ (Q ∩ observableCell obs b) :=
        setMass_union_le μ _ _

private theorem cellComplMass_union_le_left {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellComplMass μ obs (P ∪ Q) b ≤ cellComplMass μ obs P b := by
  apply setMass_mono
  intro x hx
  exact ⟨hx.1, fun hp => hx.2 (Or.inl hp)⟩

private theorem cellComplMass_union_le_right {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) (b : β) :
    cellComplMass μ obs (P ∪ Q) b ≤ cellComplMass μ obs Q b := by
  apply setMass_mono
  intro x hx
  exact ⟨hx.1, fun hq => hx.2 (Or.inr hq)⟩

private theorem min_le_min_add_min {a b a₁ a₂ b₁ b₂ : ENNReal}
    (ha : a ≤ a₁ + a₂) (hb1 : b ≤ b₁) (hb2 : b ≤ b₂) :
    min a b ≤ min a₁ b₁ + min a₂ b₂ := by
  rcases le_total a₁ b₁ with h₁ | h₁
  · -- a₁ ≤ b₁, so min(a₁, b₁) = a₁
    rcases le_total a₂ b₂ with h₂ | h₂
    · -- a₂ ≤ b₂, RHS = a₁ + a₂ ≥ a ≥ min(a, b)
      calc min a b ≤ a := min_le_left _ _
        _ ≤ a₁ + a₂ := ha
        _ = min a₁ b₁ + min a₂ b₂ := by rw [min_eq_left h₁, min_eq_left h₂]
    · -- b₂ ≤ a₂, RHS = a₁ + b₂ ≥ b₂ ≥ b ≥ min(a, b)
      calc min a b ≤ b := min_le_right _ _
        _ ≤ b₂ := hb2
        _ ≤ a₁ + b₂ := le_add_left (le_refl b₂)
        _ = min a₁ b₁ + min a₂ b₂ := by rw [min_eq_left h₁, min_eq_right h₂]
  · -- b₁ ≤ a₁, so min(a₁, b₁) = b₁
    calc min a b ≤ b := min_le_right _ _
      _ ≤ b₁ := hb1
      _ ≤ b₁ + min a₂ b₂ := le_add_right (le_refl b₁)
      _ = min a₁ b₁ + min a₂ b₂ := by rw [min_eq_right h₁]
discoveries.docstring:
Scan error is invariant under complementation of the event.
    thm:spg-discrete-complement-symmetry

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_union_le {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs (P ∪ Q) ≤ scanError μ obs P + scanError μ obs Q
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold scanError
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_le_sum (fun b _ => ?_)
  exact min_le_min_add_min
    (cellEventMass_union_le μ obs P Q b)
    (cellComplMass_union_le_left μ obs P Q b)
    (cellComplMass_union_le_right μ obs P Q b)
discoveries.docstring:
Scan error is sub-additive: ε(P ∪ Q) ≤ ε(P) + ε(Q).
    Consequence of prop:spg-scan-error-cylinder

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_scanError_union_le {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs (P ∪ Q) ≤ scanError μ obs P + scanError μ obs Q
discoveries.docstring: Paper: scan error sub-additivity (consequence of prop:spg-scan-error-cylinder)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_inter_le {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs (P ∩ Q) ≤ scanError μ obs P + scanError μ obs Q
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  -- P ∩ Q = (Pᶜ ∪ Qᶜ)ᶜ by De Morgan
  rw [show P ∩ Q = (Pᶜ ∪ Qᶜ)ᶜ from by ext x; simp []]
  -- scanError((Pᶜ ∪ Qᶜ)ᶜ) = scanError(Pᶜ ∪ Qᶜ) by complement symmetry
  rw [scanError_compl]
  -- ≤ scanError(Pᶜ) + scanError(Qᶜ) by union sub-additivity
  calc scanError μ obs (Pᶜ ∪ Qᶜ)
      ≤ scanError μ obs Pᶜ + scanError μ obs Qᶜ := scanError_union_le μ obs Pᶜ Qᶜ
    _ = scanError μ obs P + scanError μ obs Q := by
        rw [scanError_compl μ obs P, scanError_compl μ obs Q]
discoveries.docstring:
Scan error of intersection bounded by sum of individual scan errors.
    cor:spg-clarity-basic

discoveries.lean_statement:
def ObservablePure {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) : Prop
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  ∀ b, cellEventMass μ obs P b = 0 ∨ cellComplMass μ obs P b = 0
discoveries.docstring:
Discrete observable purity: every observation cell is all-in or all-out.
    def:spg-discrete-observable-purity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observablePure_observableEvent {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) :
    ObservablePure μ obs (observableEvent obs A)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  intro b
  by_cases hb : b ∈ A
  · right; simp [hb]
  · left; simp [hb]

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observablePure_iff_boundaryCells_eq_empty {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    ObservablePure μ obs P ↔ boundaryCells μ obs P = ∅
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  constructor
  · intro hPure
    ext b
    constructor
    · intro hb
      simp only [boundaryCells, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hb
      rcases hPure b with hEvent | hCompl
      · exact False.elim (hb.1 hEvent)
      · exact False.elim (hb.2 hCompl)
    · intro hb; cases hb
  · intro hEmpty b
    by_cases hEvent : cellEventMass μ obs P b = 0
    · exact Or.inl hEvent
    · right
      by_contra hCompl
      have hb : b ∈ boundaryCells μ obs P := by
        simp [boundaryCells, hEvent, hCompl]
      rw [hEmpty] at hb
      simp at hb
discoveries.docstring: thm:spg-discrete-purity-boundary-empty

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_eq_zero_of_observablePure {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α)
    (hPure : ObservablePure μ obs P) :
    scanError μ obs P = 0
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  unfold scanError
  refine (Fintype.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (f := fun b =>
    min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b)) ?_).2 ?_
  · intro b; exact bot_le
  · funext b
    rcases hPure b with hEvent | hCompl
    · simp [hEvent]
    · simp [hCompl]

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem boundaryCells_eq_empty_of_scanError_eq_zero {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α)
    (hZero : scanError μ obs P = 0) :
    boundaryCells μ obs P = ∅
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  by_contra hNotEmpty
  obtain ⟨b, hb⟩ := Finset.nonempty_iff_ne_empty.mpr hNotEmpty
  have hTerms := (Fintype.sum_eq_zero_iff_of_nonneg (f := fun b =>
    min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b)) (by
      intro b; exact bot_le)).1 (by simpa [scanError] using hZero)
  have hTermZero : min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b) = 0 := by
    simpa using congrFun hTerms b
  have hb' : cellEventMass μ obs P b ≠ 0 ∧ cellComplMass μ obs P b ≠ 0 := by
    simpa [boundaryCells] using hb
  have hPosEvent : 0 < cellEventMass μ obs P b := pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hb'.1
  have hPosCompl : 0 < cellComplMass μ obs P b := pos_iff_ne_zero.mpr hb'.2
  have hPosMin : 0 < min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b) :=
    lt_min hPosEvent hPosCompl
  rw [hTermZero] at hPosMin
  exact lt_irrefl _ hPosMin

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observablePure_of_scanError_eq_zero {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α)
    (hZero : scanError μ obs P = 0) :
    ObservablePure μ obs P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  (observablePure_iff_boundaryCells_eq_empty μ obs P).2
    (boundaryCells_eq_empty_of_scanError_eq_zero μ obs P hZero)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_eq_zero_iff_observablePure {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P = 0 ↔ ObservablePure μ obs P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  ⟨observablePure_of_scanError_eq_zero μ obs P,
   scanError_eq_zero_of_observablePure μ obs P⟩
discoveries.docstring: thm:spg-discrete-zero-iff-pure

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_eq_zero_iff_boundaryCells_eq_empty {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P = 0 ↔ boundaryCells μ obs P = ∅

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_eq_zero_iff_boundaryCells_eq_empty (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n)

    prefixScanError μ h P = 0 ↔ prefixBoundaryCells μ h P = ∅
discoveries.docstring: thm:spg-discrete-prefix-zero-iff-boundary-empty

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_compl (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h Pᶜ = prefixScanError μ h P
discoveries.docstring: thm:spg-discrete-prefix-complement

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_refines_sum {α β γ : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype γ] [DecidableEq β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs₁ : α → β) (obs₂ : α → γ) (f : γ → β)
    (hRef : ∀ a, obs₁ a = f (obs₂ a)) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    (Finset.univ.filter (fun c => f c = b)).sum (fun c => cellEventMass μ obs₂ P c)
      = cellEventMass μ obs₁ P b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  simp only [cellEventMass, setMass, Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_inter_iff,
    observableCell, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x _ => ?_)
  by_cases hxP : x ∈ P
  · simp only [hxP, true_and, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ,
      true_and, (hRef x).symm]
  · simp only [hxP, false_and, ite_false, Finset.sum_const_zero]
discoveries.docstring: Cell event mass under a refined observation decomposes as a fiberwise sum.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellComplMass_refines_sum {α β γ : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype γ] [DecidableEq β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs₁ : α → β) (obs₂ : α → γ) (f : γ → β)
    (hRef : ∀ a, obs₁ a = f (obs₂ a)) (P : Set α) (b : β) :
    (Finset.univ.filter (fun c => f c = b)).sum (fun c => cellComplMass μ obs₂ P c)
      = cellComplMass μ obs₁ P b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp_rw [← cellEventMass_compl]
  exact cellEventMass_refines_sum μ obs₁ obs₂ f hRef Pᶜ b
discoveries.docstring: Cell complement mass under a refined observation decomposes as a fiberwise sum.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_antitone_of_refines {α β γ : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] [Fintype γ]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs₁ : α → β) (obs₂ : α → γ) (f : γ → β)
    (hRef : ∀ x, obs₁ x = f (obs₂ x)) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs₂ P ≤ scanError μ obs₁ P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  let filt := fun b => Finset.univ.filter (fun c => f c = b)
  let g := fun c => min (cellEventMass μ obs₂ P c) (cellComplMass μ obs₂ P c)
  suffices hKey : ∀ b : β,
      (filt b).sum g ≤ min (cellEventMass μ obs₁ P b) (cellComplMass μ obs₁ P b) by
    show (∑ c, g c) ≤ ∑ b, min (cellEventMass μ obs₁ P b) (cellComplMass μ obs₁ P b)
    have hFib : ∑ c, g c = ∑ b, (filt b).sum g := by
      symm
      rw [← Finset.sum_biUnion]
      · refine Finset.sum_congr ?_ (fun _ _ => rfl)
        ext c; simp [filt, Finset.mem_biUnion, Finset.mem_filter]
      · intro b₁ _ b₂ _ hne
        exact Finset.disjoint_filter.2 (fun c _ h₁ h₂ => hne (h₁.symm.trans h₂))
    rw [hFib]
    exact Finset.sum_le_sum (fun b _ => hKey b)
  intro b
  calc (filt b).sum g
      ≤ min ((filt b).sum (fun c => cellEventMass μ obs₂ P c))
          ((filt b).sum (fun c => cellComplMass μ obs₂ P c)) :=
        le_min (Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => min_le_left _ _))
          (Finset.sum_le_sum (fun i _ => min_le_right _ _))
    _ = min (cellEventMass μ obs₁ P b) (cellComplMass μ obs₁ P b) := by
        rw [cellEventMass_refines_sum μ obs₁ obs₂ f hRef P b,
            cellComplMass_refines_sum μ obs₁ obs₂ f hRef P b]
discoveries.docstring:
Finer observation reduces scan error: if obs₁ = f ∘ obs₂, then SE(obs₂) ≤ SE(obs₁).
    thm:spg-observation-refinement-monotonicity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_antitone {m₁ m₂ n : Nat}
    (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h₁ : m₁ ≤ n) (h₂ : m₂ ≤ n) (hm : m₁ ≤ m₂)
    (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h₂ P ≤ prefixScanError μ h₁ P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  scanError_antitone_of_refines μ (prefixObservation h₁) (prefixObservation h₂)
    (restrictWord hm) (fun w => (restrictWord_comp hm h₂ w).symm) P
discoveries.docstring:
Prefix scan error is monotonically non-increasing in the prefix resolution.
    cor:spg-prefix-scan-error-monotonicity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_sum_eq_setMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    ∑ b, cellEventMass μ obs P b = setMass μ P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  classical
  simp only [cellEventMass, setMass, Set.indicator_apply, Set.mem_inter_iff,
    observableCell, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x _ => ?_)
  by_cases hxP : x ∈ P
  · simp only [hxP, true_and, Finset.sum_ite_eq, Finset.mem_univ, ite_true]
  · simp only [hxP, false_and, ite_false, Finset.sum_const_zero]
discoveries.docstring:
Cell event masses partition the total event mass.
    thm:spg-cell-event-mass-partition

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellComplMass_sum_eq_setMass_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    ∑ b, cellComplMass μ obs P b = setMass μ Pᶜ
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp_rw [← cellEventMass_compl]
  exact cellEventMass_sum_eq_setMass μ obs Pᶜ
discoveries.docstring:
Cell complement masses partition the total complement mass.
    thm:spg-cell-compl-mass-partition

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellMass_sum_eq_setMass_univ {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) :
    ∑ b, cellMass μ obs b = setMass μ Set.univ
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have : ∀ b, cellMass μ obs b = cellEventMass μ obs Set.univ b := by
    intro b; simp [cellMass, cellEventMass, Set.univ_inter]
  simp_rw [this]
  exact cellEventMass_sum_eq_setMass μ obs Set.univ
discoveries.docstring:
Total cell masses partition the total probability mass.
    thm:spg-cell-mass-total-partition

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_min_setMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc scanError μ obs P
      = ∑ b, min (cellEventMass μ obs P b) (cellComplMass μ obs P b) := rfl
    _ ≤ min (∑ b, cellEventMass μ obs P b) (∑ b, cellComplMass μ obs P b) :=
        le_min (Finset.sum_le_sum (fun b _ => min_le_left _ _))
          (Finset.sum_le_sum (fun b _ => min_le_right _ _))
    _ = min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) := by
        rw [cellEventMass_sum_eq_setMass, cellComplMass_sum_eq_setMass_compl]
discoveries.docstring:
Scan error is bounded by the smaller of event mass and complement mass (Bayes optimality).
    thm:spg-scan-error-bayes-optimality

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observablePure_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    ObservablePure μ obs Pᶜ ↔ ObservablePure μ obs P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  constructor <;> intro h b <;> specialize h b
  · rw [cellEventMass_compl, cellComplMass_compl] at h
    rcases h with h | h
    · exact Or.inr h
    · exact Or.inl h
  · rw [cellEventMass_compl, cellComplMass_compl]
    rcases h with h | h
    · exact Or.inr h
    · exact Or.inl h
discoveries.docstring:
Observable purity is symmetric under complement of the event (discrete).
    thm:observable-pure-compl-discrete

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem boundaryCells_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    boundaryCells μ obs Pᶜ = boundaryCells μ obs P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  ext b
  constructor
  · intro hb
    simp only [boundaryCells, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hb ⊢
    rw [cellEventMass_compl, cellComplMass_compl] at hb
    exact ⟨hb.2, hb.1⟩
  · intro hb
    simp only [boundaryCells, Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] at hb ⊢
    rw [cellEventMass_compl, cellComplMass_compl]
    exact ⟨hb.2, hb.1⟩
discoveries.docstring:
Boundary cells are the same for the event and its complement (discrete).
    thm:boundary-cells-compl-discrete

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixBoundaryCells_compl (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixBoundaryCells μ h Pᶜ = prefixBoundaryCells μ h P
discoveries.docstring:
Prefix boundary cells are the same for the event and its complement (discrete).
    thm:prefix-boundary-cells-compl-discrete

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem setMass_add_setMass_compl {α : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) (P : Set α) :
    setMass μ P + setMass μ Pᶜ = ∑ x, (μ x : ENNReal)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  simp only [setMass]
  rw [← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun x _ => ?_)
  by_cases hx : x ∈ P
  · simp [Set.indicator, hx]
  · simp [Set.indicator, hx]
discoveries.docstring: Event and complement mass partition the total probability mass.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem PMF_sum_coe_eq_one {α : Type*} [Fintype α] (μ : PMF α) :
    ∑ x, (μ x : ENNReal) = 1
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  have h := μ.tsum_coe
  rw [ENNReal.tsum_eq_iSup_sum] at h
  exact le_antisymm
    (by rw [← h]; exact le_iSup (fun s : Finset α => ∑ a ∈ s, (μ a : ENNReal)) Finset.univ)
    (by rw [← h]; exact iSup_le fun s => Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (Finset.subset_univ s))
discoveries.docstring: Total probability mass of a PMF over a Fintype is 1.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem two_mul_scanError_le_one {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    2 * scanError μ obs P ≤ 1
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc 2 * scanError μ obs P
      ≤ 2 * min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) := by
        exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (scanError_le_min_setMass μ obs P) (by norm_num)
    _ = min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) + min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) := two_mul _
    _ ≤ setMass μ P + setMass μ Pᶜ := add_le_add (min_le_left _ _) (min_le_right _ _)
    _ = ∑ x, (μ x : ENNReal) := setMass_add_setMass_compl μ P
    _ = 1 := PMF_sum_coe_eq_one μ
discoveries.docstring: Scan error is at most half for a PMF: 2 · ε(P; μ) ≤ 1.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_setMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ setMass μ P
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc scanError μ obs P
      ≤ min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) := scanError_le_min_setMass μ obs P
    _ ≤ setMass μ P := min_le_left _ _
discoveries.docstring: Scan error is bounded by the event mass alone (single-sided bound).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_scanError_le_setMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ setMass μ P
discoveries.docstring: Paper: scan error ≤ event mass (consequence of prop:spg-scan-error-cylinder)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_symmDiff_le_setMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs (symmDiff P Q) ≤ setMass μ P + setMass μ Q
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc scanError μ obs (symmDiff P Q)
      ≤ setMass μ (symmDiff P Q) := scanError_le_setMass μ obs _
    _ ≤ setMass μ (P ∪ Q) := by
        apply setMass_mono; intro x hx
        rcases hx with ⟨hp, _⟩ | ⟨hq, _⟩
        · exact Or.inl hp
        · exact Or.inr hq
    _ ≤ setMass μ P + setMass μ Q := setMass_union_le μ P Q
discoveries.docstring:
Scan error for symmetric difference bounded by event masses.
    prop:spg-scan-error-cylinder consequence

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_scanError_symmDiff_le_setMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P Q : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs (symmDiff P Q) ≤ setMass μ P + setMass μ Q
discoveries.docstring: Paper: scan error symmetric difference ≤ event masses

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_setMass_compl {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ setMass μ Pᶜ
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc scanError μ obs P
      ≤ min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) := scanError_le_min_setMass μ obs P
    _ ≤ setMass μ Pᶜ := min_le_right _ _
discoveries.docstring: Scan error is bounded by the complement mass alone (single-sided bound).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observableCell_const_eq_univ {α : Type*} (c : β) :
    observableCell (fun _ : α => c) c = Set.univ

discoveries.lean_statement:

    (boundaryCells μ obs P).card ≤ Fintype.card β

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_eq_zero_at_full_resolution
    (μ : PMF (Word n)) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ (Nat.le_refl n) P = scanError μ (prefixObservation (Nat.le_refl n)) P
discoveries.docstring: Scan error under prefix observable decreases to zero as resolution increases past n.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_observableEvent_refines_zero {α β γ : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] [Fintype γ]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs₁ : α → β) (obs₂ : α → γ) (f : γ → β)
    (hRef : ∀ x, obs₁ x = f (obs₂ x)) (A : Set β) :
    scanError μ obs₂ (observableEvent obs₁ A) ≤ scanError μ obs₁ (observableEvent obs₁ A)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  exact scanError_antitone_of_refines μ obs₁ obs₂ f hRef _
discoveries.docstring: Observable events from a coarser observable are also zero-error for finer observables.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_mono {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) {P Q : Set α} (h : P ⊆ Q) (b : β) :
    cellEventMass μ obs P b ≤ cellEventMass μ obs Q b
discoveries.docstring: Cell event mass is monotone in event containment (discrete).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_sum_cellMass {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ ∑ b, cellMass μ obs b
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc scanError μ obs P
      ≤ Finset.sum (boundaryCells μ obs P) (fun b => cellMass μ obs b) :=
        scanError_le_boundaryMass μ obs P
    _ ≤ ∑ b, cellMass μ obs b :=
        Finset.sum_le_sum_of_subset (Finset.filter_subset _ _)
discoveries.docstring: Scan error is bounded by twice any individual cell's min(event, complement) mass.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellEventMass_eq_of_inter_eq {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) {P Q : Set α} (b : β)
    (h : P ∩ observableCell obs b = Q ∩ observableCell obs b) :
    cellEventMass μ obs P b = cellEventMass μ obs Q b
discoveries.docstring: The cell event mass of P equals that of Q when P and Q agree on cell b.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_eq_of_cells_eq {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) {P Q : Set α}
    (h : ∀ b, P ∩ observableCell obs b = Q ∩ observableCell obs b) :
    scanError μ obs P = scanError μ obs Q
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  unfold scanError
  refine Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun b _ => ?_)
  have hEvent := cellEventMass_eq_of_inter_eq μ obs b (h b)
  have hDiff : ∀ b, observableCell obs b \ P = observableCell obs b \ Q := by
    intro b'
    ext x
    simp only [Set.mem_diff, observableCell, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    constructor
    · intro ⟨hx, hnP⟩
      refine ⟨hx, fun hQ => hnP ?_⟩
      have : x ∈ Q ∩ observableCell obs b' := ⟨hQ, hx⟩
      rw [← h b'] at this
      exact this.1
    · intro ⟨hx, hnQ⟩
      refine ⟨hx, fun hP => hnQ ?_⟩
      have : x ∈ P ∩ observableCell obs b' := ⟨hP, hx⟩
      rw [h b'] at this
      exact this.1
  have hCompl : cellComplMass μ obs P b = cellComplMass μ obs Q b := by
    simp [cellComplMass, hDiff b]
  rw [hEvent, hCompl]
discoveries.docstring: Scan error only depends on how the event intersects each observation cell.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_empty_event {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) : scanError μ obs ∅ = 0
discoveries.docstring: Scan error is zero when P = ∅ (named alias).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_full_event {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) : scanError μ obs Set.univ = 0
discoveries.docstring: Scan error is zero when P = univ (named alias).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_id_eq_min_setMass {α : Type*} [Fintype α]
    (μ : PMF α) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ id P ≤ min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ)
discoveries.docstring:
The identity observation (obs = id) gives scan error = min(μ(P), μ(Pᶜ)).
    This is the Bayes-optimal bound achieved at maximum resolution.

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_inter_observableEvent {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (A : Set β) :

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem boundaryCells_complement_eq {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    boundaryCells μ obs Pᶜ = boundaryCells μ obs P

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_zero_resolution (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : 0 ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h P ≤ min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ)
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  exact le_trans (scanError_le_min_setMass μ _ P) le_rfl

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cellMass_nonneg {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem cell_partition {α β : Type*} [Fintype α]

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_combinatorial_bound {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (κ : ENNReal)
    (hκ : ∀ b, cellMass μ obs b ≤ κ) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ (boundaryCells μ obs P).card * κ

:=
  scanError_le_boundaryCard_mul μ obs P κ hκ

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixBoundaryCells_card_le (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_supermartingale (μ : PMF (Word n))
    (h₁ : m₁ ≤ n) (h₂ : m₂ ≤ n) (hm : m₁ ≤ m₂) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h₂ P ≤ prefixScanError μ h₁ P

:=
  prefixScanError_antitone μ h₁ h₂ hm P

Prefix scan error sequence is non-increasing: the scan error profile is a
    discrete supermartingale in resolution. This is Plan 15 from the implementation plan.

discoveries.lean_statement:

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_step (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h₁ : m ≤ n) (h₂ : m + 1 ≤ n)

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem observablePure_singleton {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]

discoveries.lean_statement:

discoveries.lean_statement:

discoveries.lean_statement:

discoveries.lean_statement:

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_le_one {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) :
    scanError μ obs P ≤ 1
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  calc scanError μ obs P
      ≤ min (setMass μ P) (setMass μ Pᶜ) := scanError_le_min_setMass μ obs P
    _ ≤ setMass μ P := min_le_left _ _
    _ ≤ setMass μ Set.univ := setMass_mono μ (Set.subset_univ _)
    _ ≤ ∑ x, (μ x : ENNReal) := by simp [setMass]
    _ = 1 := PMF_sum_coe_eq_one μ
discoveries.docstring: Scan error bounded by total mass (trivially ≤ 1 for PMF).

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem prefixScanError_le_one (μ : PMF (Word n)) (h : m ≤ n) (P : Set (Word n)) :
    prefixScanError μ h P ≤ 1

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem paper_boundary_vs_adjacency (totalFaces externalFaces internalPairs cubeCount dim : Nat)
    (h : totalFaces = 2 * dim * cubeCount)
    (hdecomp : totalFaces = externalFaces + 2 * internalPairs) :
    externalFaces = 2 * dim * cubeCount - 2 * internalPairs
discoveries.docstring:
F + 2E = 2nN: boundary face count = 2n*cubes - 2*internal adjacencies.
    prop:spg-dyadic-polyclube-boundary-vs-adjacency-identity

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem scanError_iUnion_finset_le {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β]
    {ι : Type*} [DecidableEq ι]
    (μ : PMF α) (obs : α → β) (S : Finset ι) (P : ι → Set α) :
    scanError μ obs (⋃ i ∈ S, P i) ≤ S.sum (fun i => scanError μ obs (P i))
discoveries.lean_proof:
:= by
  induction S using Finset.induction_on with
  | empty => simp [scanError_empty]
  | @insert j T hna ih =>
    rw [Finset.sum_insert hna]
    have hunion : (⋃ i ∈ insert j T, P i) = P j ∪ ⋃ i ∈ T, P i := by
      simp
    rw [hunion]
    exact le_trans (scanError_union_le μ obs (P j) (⋃ i ∈ T, P i))
      (add_le_add_right ih _)
discoveries.docstring:
Scan error is subadditive over Finset unions.
    prop:spg-scan-error-cylinder

discoveries.lean_statement:
theorem symmetricDiffMass_eq_scanError_of_optimal
    {n m : Nat} (h : m ≤ n) (μ : PMF (Word n)) (P Pstar : Set (Word n))
    (hstar : setMass μ ((P \ Pstar) ∪ (Pstar \ P)) = scanError μ (prefixObservation h) P) :
    setMass μ ((P \ Pstar) ∪ (Pstar \ P)) ≤ scanError μ (prefixObservation h) P
discoveries.docstring:
Recovery target for the deferred Walsh spec.
    cor:spg-clarity-walsh-spectral-stability

def cellEventMeasure {α β : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α]
    (μ : MeasureTheory.Measure α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) (b : β) : ENNReal

def cellMeasure {α β : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α]
    (μ : MeasureTheory.Measure α) (obs : α → β) (b : β) : ENNReal

discoveries.lean_statement:
def scanErrorMeasure {α β : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α] [Fintype β]
    (μ : MeasureTheory.Measure α) (obs : α → β) (P : Set α) : ENNReal
discoveries.lean_proof:
:=
  ∑ b, min (cellEventMeasure μ obs P b) (cellComplMeasure μ obs P b)

Scan error for a finite observable under a general measure.
